271701.english: And there came one of the seven angels which had the seven vials, and talked with me, saying unto me, Come hither; I will shew unto thee the judgment of the great whore that sitteth upon many waters:
271701.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎦᎵᏉᎩ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎵᏉᎩ ᎫᎫ ᏥᏓᏂᏰᎲᎩ, ᎤᎷᏨᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏆᎵᏃᎮᏔᏅᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᎩᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᎡᎮᎾ; ᏓᎬᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎵ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏣᎫᎪᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏁᎫᏥᏛ ᎠᎨᏴ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᎠᎹ ᏚᏪᏴ ᏧᏬᎳ;
271701.phonetic: A-si-yv-wi-no na-s-gi na ga-li-quo-gi i-ya-ni-dv ge-sv di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi, na-s-gi ga-li-quo-gi gu-gu tsi-da-ni-ye-hv-gi, u-lu-tsv-gi a-le a-qua-li-no-he-ta-nv-gi, hi-a na-gi-we-se-lv-gi, E-he-na; da-gv-na-nu-go-wi-se-li nu-s-dv tsa-gu-go-da-ne-di ge-sv u-tsa-ti u-ne-gu-tsi-dv a-ge-yv, u-tsa-ti a-ma du-we-yv tsu-wo-la;

271702.english: With whom the kings of the earth have committed fornication, and the inhabitants of the earth have been made drunk with the wine of her fornication.
271702.cherokee: ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᏧᎾᏂᏏᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏓᏁᏩᏗᏒ ᏧᏂᏴᏍᏕᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎩᎦᎨ-ᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᏚᏂᏏᏂᏙᎸ ᎤᏩᏛᏛ.
271702.phonetic: U-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi e-lo-hi a-ne-hi u-de-li-dv tsu-na-ni-si-nv-hi tsi-gi, a-le e-lo-hi da-ne-wa-di-sv tsu-ni-yv-s-de-s-ta-nv-hi tsi-gi gi-ga-ge--a-di-ta-s-di u-de-li-dv du-ni-si-ni-do-lv u-wa-dv-dv.

271703.english: So he carried me away in the spirit into the wilderness: and I saw a woman sit upon a scarlet coloured beast, full of names of blasphemy, having seven heads and ten horns.
271703.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎬᏗ ᎢᎾᎨ ᏩᏆᏘᏅᏍᏔᏅᎩ; ᎠᎨᏴᏃ ᎥᏥᎪᎲᎩ ᎩᎦᎨ ᏗᎧᏃᏗᏱ ᏅᎩ-ᏗᎦᏅᏌᏗ ᎤᎩᎸᏛᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎨᏒᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏚᏙᎥ ᎠᏐᏢᎢᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ ᎦᎵᏉᎩ ᏓᏍᎫᏓᏛᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᎪᎯ ᏕᎤᎷᎬᎩ.
271703.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no a-da-nv-do gv-di i-na-ge wa-qua-ti-nv-s-ta-nv-gi; a-ge-yv-no v-tsi-go-hv-gi gi-ga-ge di-ka-no-di-yi nv-gi--di-ga-nv-sa-di u-gi-lv-dv-gi na-s-gi u-ka-li-tsv-hi ge-sv-gi u-ne-la-nv-hi du-do-v a-so-tlv-i-s-do-di ge-sv-i ga-li-quo-gi da-s-gu-da-dv-gi, a-le a-s-go-hi de-u-lu-gv-gi.

271704.english: And the woman was arrayed in purple and scarlet colour, and decked with gold and precious stones and pearls, having a golden cup in her hand full of abominations and filthiness of her fornication:
271704.cherokee: ᎠᎨᏴᏃ ᏗᏕᎭᎷᎨ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎩᎦᎨ ᏚᏄᏩᎥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏕᎸ-ᏓᎶᏂᎨ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎦᎸᏉᏗ, ᏅᏯ ᎠᎴ ᏓᎬᎾ-ᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ ᏚᏣᏅᏛᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏕᎸ-ᏓᎶᏂᎨ ᎠᏢᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎵᏍᏈᏗ ᎠᏰᎲᎩ ᎠᎧᎵᎢ ᎤᏂᏆᏘᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎢᎸᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᏚᏂᏏᏂᏙᎸ ᎤᏩᏛᏛ.
271704.phonetic: A-ge-yv-no di-de-ha-lu-ge a-le di-gi-ga-ge du-nu-wa-v-gi, a-le a-de-lv--da-lo-ni-ge a-le di-ga-lv-quo-di, nv-ya a-le da-gv-na--i-yu-na-s-di du-tsa-nv-dv-gi, a-le a-de-lv--da-lo-ni-ge a-tlv-la-nv-hi u-li-s-qui-di a-ye-hv-gi a-ka-li-i u-ni-qua-ti-s-di ge-sv, a-le u-ne-i-lv-di na-s-gi u-de-li-dv du-ni-si-ni-do-lv u-wa-dv-dv.

271705.english: And upon her forehead was a name written, MYSTERY, BABYLON THE GREAT, THE MOTHER OF HARLOTS AND ABOMINATIONS OF THE EARTH.
271705.cherokee: ᎠᎬᏓᎨᏂᏃ ᏚᏙᎥ ᎪᏪᎸᎩ, [ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏅᎩ] ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏓᏓᎶᏂ ᎡᏆ, ᎤᏂᏁᎫᏥᏛ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ ᎤᏂᏥ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏆᏘᏍᏗ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎡᎯ.
271705.phonetic: A-gv-da-ge-ni-no du-do-v go-we-lv-gi, [hi-a ni-gv-nv-gi] U-De-Li-Dv Ge-Sv-I, Da-Da-Lo-Ni E-Qua, U-Ni-Ne-Gu-Tsi-Dv A-Ni-Ge-Yv U-Ni-Tsi A-Le U-Ni-Qua-Ti-S-Di E-Lo-Hi E-Hi.

271706.english: And I saw the woman drunken with the blood of the saints, and with the blood of the martyrs of Jesus: and when I saw her, I wondered with great admiration.
271706.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎥᏥᎪᎥᎩ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᎤᏂᎩᎬ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏌ ᎬᏩᏃᎮᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎩᎬ ᎤᏴᏍᏕᏍᏗᏍᎬᎩ; ᏥᎪᎥᏃ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎠᏍᏆᏂᎪᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏗ ᎠᎩᏍᏆᏂᎪᏒᎩ.
271706.phonetic: A-le a-ge-yv v-tsi-go-v-gi u-na-da-nv-ti u-ni-gi-gv, a-le Tsi-sa gv-wa-no-he-s-gi u-ni-gi-gv u-yv-s-de-s-di-s-gv-gi; tsi-go-v-no u-tsa-ti a-s-qua-ni-go-hi-s-di ge-sv gv-di a-gi-s-qua-ni-go-sv-gi.

271707.english: And the angel said unto me, Wherefore didst thou marvel? I will tell thee the mystery of the woman, and of the beast that carrieth her, which hath the seven heads and ten horns.
271707.cherokee: ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎾᎩᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎥᏣᏍᏆᏂᎪᎵ?  ᏓᎬᏃᏁᎵ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎦᏛᎬ ᎠᎨᏴ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎦᏛᎬ ᏅᎩᏗᎦᏅᏌᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎩᎸᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎵᏉᎩ ᏥᏓᏍᎫᏓᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᎪᎯ ᏥᏚᎷᎦ.
271707.phonetic: Di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi-no hi-a na-gi-we-se-lv-gi, Ga-do-no v-tsa-s-qua-ni-go-li?  Da-gv-no-ne-li nu-s-dv ga-dv-gv a-ge-yv, a-le nu-s-dv ga-dv-gv nv-gi-di-ga-nv-sa-di na-s-gi tsu-gi-lv-di, na-s-gi ga-li-quo-gi tsi-da-s-gu-da-dv a-le a-s-go-hi tsi-du-lu-ga.

271708.english: The beast that thou sawest was, and is not; and shall ascend out of the bottomless pit, and go into perdition: and they that dwell on the earth shall wonder, whose names were not written in the book of life from the foundation of the world, when they behold the beast that was, and is not, and yet is.
271708.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏅᎩ-ᏗᎦᏅᏌᏗ ᏥᎪᎥᎩ, ᎡᎲᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏰᎭ; ᎠᎴ ᏙᏛᎴᏂ ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᏗᏔᎴᏒ ᏓᎦᏄᎪᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᏛᏙᏗᏱ ᏮᏓᎦᎶᏏ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ Ꮎ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᎾᏙᎥ ᏂᏗᎪᏪᎳᏅ Ꮎ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎪᏪᎵᎯ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏧᏙᏢᏅ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᎴᏅᏛ ᏛᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏏ ᎠᏂᎪᎲᎭ ᏅᎩ-ᏗᎦᏅᏌᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏤᎲᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏁᎲᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏤᎭ.
271708.phonetic: Na-s-gi na nv-gi--di-ga-nv-sa-di tsi-go-v-gi, e-hv-gi, a-le v-tla ye-ha; a-le do-dv-le-ni wi-na-s-dv-na di-ta-le-sv da-ga-nu-go-tsi, a-le a-tsi-dv-do-di-yi wv-da-ga-lo-si, na-s-gi-no na e-lo-hi a-ne-hi na-s-gi du-na-do-v ni-di-go-we-la-nv na gv-ni-dv go-we-li-hi e-lo-hi tsu-do-tlv-nv nv-da-gv-wa-le-nv-dv dv-ni-s-qua-ni-go-si a-ni-go-hv-ha nv-gi--di-ga-nv-sa-di na-s-gi tse-hv-gi, a-le ne-hv-na tsi-gi, a-se-no na-s-gi tse-ha.

271709.english: And here is the mind which hath wisdom. The seven heads are seven mountains, on which the woman sitteth.
271709.cherokee: ᎠᏂ ᎠᎦᏙᎲᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎬᏙᏗ ᎪᎵᏍᏗ.  ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎦᎵᏉᎩ ᏓᏍᎫᏓᏛ ᎦᎵᏉᎩ ᏙᏓᎸ ᎦᏛᎦ, ᎾᎿᎭᎠᎨᏴ ᏧᏬᎳ.
271709.phonetic: A-ni a-ga-do-hv-hi-s-di ge-sv a-da-nv-do gv-do-di go-li-s-di.  Na-s-gi na ga-li-quo-gi da-s-gu-da-dv ga-li-quo-gi do-da-lv ga-dv-ga, na-hna a-ge-yv tsu-wo-la.

271710.english: And there are seven kings: five are fallen, and one is, and the other is not yet come; and when he cometh, he must continue a short space.
271710.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎦᎵᏉᎩ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ; ᎯᏍᎩ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎤᎾᎵᏛᏔᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎡᎭ, ᏐᎢᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏏ ᏱᎦᎾᏄᎪᎦ; ᎠᎴ ᎦᎷᏨᎭ ᏝᎦ ᎤᏕᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
271710.phonetic: A-le ga-li-quo-gi na-ni-v u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi; hi-s-gi i-ya-ni-dv u-na-li-dv-ta-nv, a-le a-si-yv-wi e-ha, so-i-no v-tla a-si yi-ga-na-nu-go-ga; a-le ga-lu-tsv-ha tla-ga u-de-di ge-se-s-di.

271711.english: And the beast that was, and is not, even he is the eighth, and is of the seven, and goeth into perdition.
271711.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ Ꮎ ᏅᎩ-ᏗᎦᏅᏌᏗ ᏤᎲᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏁᎲᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏁᎵᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᎵᏉᎩ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎨᎳ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᏛᏙᏗᏱ ᏮᏓᎦᎶᏏ.
271711.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no na nv-gi--di-ga-nv-sa-di tse-hv-gi, a-le na-s-gi ne-hv-na tsi-gi, na-s-gi tsu-ne-li-ne-i, a-le na-s-gi du-li-quo-gi i-ya-ni-dv ge-sv ge-la, a-le a-tsi-dv-do-di-yi wv-da-ga-lo-si.

271712.english: And the ten horns which thou sawest are ten kings, which have received no kingdom as yet; but receive power as kings one hour with the beast.
271712.cherokee: ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏃ ᏕᎤᎷᎬ ᏥᏕᏣᎪᎲᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎪᎯ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎦᏛᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏏ ᎨᏥᏁᎸᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎨᎦᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎭᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏂᏁᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏂᏁᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏌᏉ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᏅᎩ-ᏗᎦᏅᏌᏗ ᎤᏠᏱ ᎧᏁᎬᎢ.
271712.phonetic: A-s-go-hi-no de-u-lu-gv tsi-de-tsa-go-hv-gi, na-s-gi a-s-go-hi u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi ga-dv-ga, na-s-gi u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi i-yu-na-li-s-do-di-yi ge-sv a-si ge-tsi-ne-lv-hi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i; ge-ga-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-ha-s-gi-ni-no-nv u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi u-ni-ne-i-s-di ge-sv u-ni-ne-i-s-di-yi sa-quo i-yu-tli-lo-dv nv-gi--di-ga-nv-sa-di u-tlo-yi ka-ne-gv-i.

271713.english: These have one mind, and shall give their power and strength unto the beast.
271713.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏌᏉ ᏄᏅᏅ ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᎩ-ᏗᎦᏅᏌᏗ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᎾᏒᎦᎸ ᎠᎴ ᏚᎾᎵᏂᎬᎬ ᏙᏛᏂᏲᎯᏎᎵ.
271713.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi sa-quo nu-nv-nv du-na-da-nv-dv-i, a-le nv-gi--di-ga-nv-sa-di nu-s-dv u-na-sv-ga-lv a-le du-na-li-ni-gv-gv do-dv-ni-yo-hi-se-li.

271714.english: These shall make war with the Lamb, and the Lamb shall overcome them: for he is Lord of lords, and King of kings: and they that are with him are called, and chosen, and faithful.
271714.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏓᎿᎭᏩ ᏅᏛᏅᏁᎵ ᎤᏃᏕᎾ ᎠᎩᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏃᏕᎾ ᎠᎩᎾ ᏙᏛᏎᎪᎩᏏ ᎾᏍᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ; ᎠᎴ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᏜᏓᏩᏍᏗᏕᎩ ᏥᎩ ᎨᏥᏯᏅᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎨᎦᏑᏰᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᎾᏓᎵᏓᏍᏛᎾ.
271714.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi da-hna-wa nv-dv-nv-ne-li U-no-de-na a-gi-na, a-le U-no-de-na a-gi-na do-dv-se-go-gi-si na-s-gi; na-s-gi-ye-no u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi a-ne-hv U-gv-wi-yu-hi; a-le nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-ne-hv na-s-gi Nu-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi; a-le na-s-gi gv-wa-dla-wa-s-di-de-gi tsi-gi ge-tsi-ya-nv-dv, a-le ge-ga-su-ye-dv, a-le nu-na-da-li-da-s-dv-na.

271715.english: And he saith unto me, The waters which thou sawest, where the whore sitteth, are peoples, and multitudes, and nations, and tongues.
271715.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᎾᎩᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᎠᎹ ᏥᏕᏣᎪᎲᎩ, ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏁᎫᏥᏛ ᎠᎨᏴ ᏧᏬᎳ, ᏴᏫ ᎦᏛᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏓᏤᎵᏗ ᏴᏫ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏗᏂᏬᏂᏍᎩ ᎨᏒᎢ.
271715.phonetic: A-le hi-a na-gi-we-se-lv-gi, A-ma tsi-de-tsa-go-hv-gi, na-hna u-ne-gu-tsi-dv a-ge-yv tsu-wo-la, yv-wi ga-dv-ga, a-le u-ni-tsa-ti ge-sv-i, a-le u-na-da-tse-li-di yv-wi, a-le tsu-da-le-nv-dv di-ni-wo-ni-s-gi ge-sv-i.

271716.english: And the ten horns which thou sawest upon the beast, these shall hate the whore, and shall make her desolate and naked, and shall eat her flesh, and burn her with fire.
271716.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᎪᎯ ᏕᎤᎷᎬ ᏥᏕᏣᎪᎲᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᎩ-ᏗᎦᏅᏌᏗ ᏚᎷᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏓᎬᏩᏂᏆᏘᎵ ᎤᏁᎫᏥᏛ ᎠᎨᏴ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᏔ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏰᎸᎭ ᏅᏓᏰᎬᏁᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏇᏓᎸ ᏓᎬᏩᎨᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᎸ ᎬᏗ ᏓᎬᏩᎪᎲᏍᏔᏂ.
271716.phonetic: A-le a-s-go-hi de-u-lu-gv tsi-de-tsa-go-hv-gi, na-s-gi nv-gi--di-ga-nv-sa-di du-lu-gv-i, na-s-gi da-gv-wa-ni-qua-ti-li u-ne-gu-tsi-dv a-ge-yv, a-le nv-ta a-le u-ye-lv-ha nv-da-ye-gv-ne-li, a-le u-que-da-lv da-gv-wa-ge-li, a-le a-tsi-lv gv-di da-gv-wa-go-hv-s-ta-ni.

271717.english: For God hath put in their hearts to fulfill his will, and to agree, and give their kingdom unto the beast, until the words of God shall be fulfilled.
271717.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᏚᎳᏁᎸ ᎫᏂᎾᏫᏱ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏌᏉ ᎢᏳᏅᏁᏗᏱ ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏂᏲᎯᏎᏗᏱ ᏅᎩ-ᏗᎦᏅᏌᏗ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎬᏂ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
271717.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no du-la-ne-lv gu-ni-na-wi-yi nu-s-dv a-da-nv-te-s-gv u-ni-s-qua-di-s-di-yi, a-le sa-quo i-yu-nv-ne-di-yi du-na-da-nv-dv-i, a-le tsu-ni-yo-hi-se-di-yi nv-gi--di-ga-nv-sa-di na-hna u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i, gv-ni U-ne-la-nv-hi u-ne-tsv na-s-gi i-yu-li-s-ta-nv-hi ge-se-s-di.

271718.english: And the woman which thou sawest is that great city, which reigneth over the kings of the earth.
271718.cherokee: ᎠᎨᏴᏃ Ꮎ ᏥᎪᏩᏘᏍᎬᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎡᏆ ᎦᏚᎲ ᎦᏛᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᏥᎩ.
271718.phonetic: A-ge-yv-no na tsi-go-wa-ti-s-gv-gi na-s-gi na e-qua ga-du-hv ga-dv-ga, na-s-gi u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi e-lo-hi a-ne-hv u-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi tsi-gi.

271801.english: And after these things I saw another angel come down from heaven, having great power; and the earth was lightened with his glory.
271801.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎸ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎥᏥᎪᎥᎩ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏓᏳᏠᎠᏒᎩ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎨᏒᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎢᎦ ᎤᏘᏍᏔᏅᎩ.
271801.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a nu-li-s-ta-ni-do-lv nv-wa-da-le di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi v-tsi-go-v-gi ga-lv-la-di da-yu-tlo-a-sv-gi, u-tsa-ti u-li-ni-gi-dv ge-sv-gi; na-s-gi-no u-tse-li ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv e-lo-hi i-ga u-ti-s-ta-nv-gi.

271802.english: And he cried mightily with a strong voice, saying, Babylon the great is fallen, is fallen, and is become the habitation of devils, and the hold of every foul spirit, and a cage of every unclean and hateful bird.
271802.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᏓᏯ ᎤᏪᎷᏅᎩ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎧᏁᎬ ᎬᏗ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬᎩ, ᏓᏓᎶᏂ ᎡᏆ ᎠᏲᎩ, ᎠᏲᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏍᎩᎾ ᎤᎾᏕᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏓ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎠᏂᎦᏓᎭ ᏗᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏂᏴᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎠᏂᎦᏓᎭ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏂᏆᏘᏍᏗ ᏥᏍᏆ ᎤᎾᏁᎳᏗᏍᏗᏱ.
271802.phonetic: A-le a-s-da-ya u-we-lu-nv-gi u-li-ni-gi-dv ka-ne-gv gv-di, hi-a ni-ga-we-s-gv-gi, Da-da-lo-ni e-qua a-yo-gi, a-yo-gi, a-le a-ni-s-gi-na u-na-de-di-yi ni-ga-li-s-da, a-le na-ni-v a-ni-ga-da-ha di-da-nv-do u-ni-yv-s-di-yi, a-le na-ni-v a-ni-ga-da-ha a-le u-ni-ni-qua-ti-s-di tsi-s-qua u-na-ne-la-di-s-di-yi.

271803.english: For all nations have drunk of the wine of the wrath of her fornication, and the kings of the earth have committed fornication with her, and the merchants of the earth are waxed rich through the abundance of her delicacies.
271803.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏗᏳᏰᏃ ᎤᎾᏓᏤᎵᏛ ᏴᏫ ᏓᏁᏩᏗᏒ ᎤᎾᏗᏔᎲ ᎩᎦᎨ-ᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗ ᎤᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏓᏑᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᏚᏂᏏᏂᏙᎸ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᏚᎾᏂᏏᏂᏙᎸ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏃᏗᏍᎩ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏁᎯ ᏚᏁᏅᎢᏍᏔᏅ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏢᏉᏗ ᎡᎲᎢ.
271803.phonetic: Ni-ga-di-yu-ye-no u-na-da-tse-li-dv yv-wi da-ne-wa-di-sv u-na-di-ta-hv gi-ga-ge--a-di-ta-s-di u-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di ge-sv u-da-su-yi na-s-gi u-de-li-dv du-ni-si-ni-do-lv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv, a-le u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi e-lo-hi a-ne-hi na-s-gi u-de-li-dv du-na-ni-si-ni-do-lv, a-le a-ni-no-di-s-gi e-lo-hi a-ne-hi du-ne-nv-i-s-ta-nv na-s-gi u-tsa-ti u-tlv-quo-di e-hv-i.

271804.english: And I heard another voice from heaven, saying, Come out of her, my people, that ye be not partakers of her sins, and that ye receive not of her plagues.
271804.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎩᎶ ᏗᎧᏁᎬ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎠᏆᏛᎦᏅᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏅᏓᎦᏪᏍᎬᎩ, ᏂᎯ ᏗᏆᏤᎵᎦ ᏴᏫ ᎡᏥᏄᎪᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᏠᏯᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏥᏙᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᏕᏯᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏣᏠᏯᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
271804.phonetic: A-le nv-wa-da-le gi-lo di-ka-ne-gv ga-lv-la-di a-qua-dv-ga-nv-gi, hi-a nv-da-ga-we-s-gv-gi, Ni-hi di-qua-tse-li-ga yv-wi e-tsi-nu-go-i, na-s-gi i-tsa-tlo-ya-s-do-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na na-s-gi u-s-ga-nv-tsi-do-lv-i, a-le na-s-gi u-tse-li u-de-ya-do-di ge-sv i-tsa-tlo-ya-s-do-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na.

271805.english: For her sins have reached unto heaven, and God hath remembered her iniquities.
271805.cherokee: ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏥᏙᎸᏰᏃ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏭᎷᏨ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏅᏓᏛ ᎤᏲ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎵᏙᎸᎢ.
271805.phonetic: U-s-ga-nv-tsi-do-lv-ye-no ga-lv-la-di i-yv-dv wu-lu-tsv, a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi u-nv-da-dv u-yo-du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-li-do-lv-i.

271806.english: Reward her even as she rewarded you, and double unto her double according to her works: in the cup which she hath filled fill to her double.
271806.cherokee: ᎡᏣᎫᏴᏏ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᏣᎫᏴᎡᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏔᎵ ᎢᏳᏩᎫᏗ ᎡᏣᎫᏴᏏ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ; ᎤᎵᏍᏈᏗ ᎤᎧᎵᎸᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏔᎵ ᎢᏳᏩᎫᏗ ᎡᏥᎧᎵᎢᏏ.
271806.phonetic: E-tsa-gu-yv-si na-s-gi-ya i-tsa-gu-yv-e-lv-i, a-le ta-li i-yu-wa-gu-di e-tsa-gu-yv-si na-s-gi-ya du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-i; u-li-s-qui-di u-ka-li-lv-hi na-s-gi ta-li i-yu-wa-gu-di e-tsi-ka-li-i-si.

271807.english: How much she hath glorified herself, and lived deliciously, so much torment and sorrow give her: for she saith in her heart, I sit a queen, and am no widow, and shall see no sorrow.
271807.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏓᎸᏉᏔᏅᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏢᏉᏗ ᎤᏕᏅᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎠᎩᎵᏯ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲ ᎠᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎡᏥᎥᏏ; ᎤᎾᏫᏱᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ, ᎠᎩᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏉᎳ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏉᏑᎶᏨᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲ ᎠᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏴᎦᏥᎪᏩᏛ.
271807.phonetic: Na-s-gi ni-ga-v u-wa-sv u-da-lv-quo-ta-nv-i a-le u-tlv-quo-di u-de-nv-i, na-s-gi i-ga-i a-gi-li-ya a-le u-yo a-da-nv-da-di-s-di ge-sv e-tsi-v-si; u-na-wi-yi-ye-no hi-a ni-ga-we-ha, a-gi-gv-wi-yu-hi a-quo-la, v-tla a-quo-su-lo-tsv-hi yi-gi, v-tla a-le u-yo a-da-nv-da-di-s-di ge-sv yv-ga-tsi-go-wa-dv.

271808.english: Therefore shall her plagues come in one day, death, and mourning, and famine; and she shall be utterly burned with fire: for strong is the Lord God who judgeth her.
271808.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏕᏯᏙᏗᏍᎩ ᎨᏒ ᏏᏉᏃ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏴᎳᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎪᎸ; ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᎪᎲᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏥᎸ ᎬᏗ; ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳᏰᏃ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏭᎪᏓᏁᎯ ᏥᎩ.
271808.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di u-de-ya-do-di-s-gi ge-sv si-quo-no u-lu-hi-s-di ge-se-s-di, a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv, a-le di-yv-la-s-di ge-sv, a-le a-go-lv; a-le a-ga-go-hv-s-do-di ge-se-s-di a-tsi-lv gv-di; u-li-ni-gi-di-yu-ye-no U-gv-wi-yu-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-gi tsu-wu-go-da-ne-hi tsi-gi.

271809.english: And the kings of the earth, who have committed fornication and lived deliciously with her, shall bewail her, and lament for her, when they shall see the smoke of her burning,
271809.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏁᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᏧᎾᏂᏏᏂᏙᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏢᏉᏗ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎤᎾᏕᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏓᎬᏩᏍᎪᏂᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏔᏂ ᏙᏛᏂᏴᎳᏏ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᏂᎪᎲᎭ ᏚᎦᏒᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎪᎲᏍᎬᎢ,
271809.phonetic: A-le u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi e-lo-hi a-ne-hi, na-s-gi u-de-li-dv tsu-na-ni-si-ni-do-lv-hi ge-sv-i, a-le u-tlv-quo-di i-tsu-la-ha u-na-de-nv-hi, na-s-gi da-gv-wa-s-go-ni-li, a-le na-s-gi nv-da-ga-li-s-do-ta-ni do-dv-ni-yv-la-si, hna-quo a-ni-go-hv-ha du-ga-sv-s-dv na-s-gi a-go-hv-s-gv-i,

271810.english: Standing afar off for the fear of her torment, saying, Alas, alas, that great city Babylon, that mighty city! for in one hour is thy judgment come.
271810.cherokee: ᎢᏅ ᏗᏂᏙᎾᎡᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᎢᎲ ᎠᎩᎵᏲᎬ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎤᏲᏍᏛᏉ, ᎤᏲᏍᏛᏉ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎡᏆ ᏓᏓᎶᏂ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎦᏚᎲᎢ!  ᏑᏟᎶᏛᏉᏰᏃ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ ᏗᏣᏚᎪᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏣᎷᏥᏏ.
271810.phonetic: I-nv di-ni-do-na-e-s-di a-ni-s-ga-i-hv a-gi-li-yo-gv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-i, hi-a na-ni-we-s-ge-s-di, U-yo-s-dv-quo, u-yo-s-dv-quo, na-s-gi na e-qua Da-da-lo-ni, na-s-gi u-li-ni-gi-dv ga-du-hv-i!  su-tli-lo-dv-quo-ye-no i-go-hi-dv di-tsa-du-go-da-ne-di ge-sv tsa-lu-tsi-si.

271811.english: And the merchants of the earth shall weep and mourn over her; for no man buyeth their merchandise any more:
271811.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏃᏔᏅᎲᏍᎩᏃ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏁᎯ ᏙᏛᎾᏠᏱᎵ ᎠᎴ ᏙᏛᏂᏴᎳᏏ ᏓᎬᏩᏍᎪᏂᎵ ᎾᏍᎩ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎩᎶ ᏱᎬᏩᏂᏩᎯᏎᎭ ᎦᏃᏙᏗ;
271811.phonetic: A-ni-no-ta-nv-hv-s-gi-no e-lo-hi a-ne-hi do-dv-na-tlo-yi-li a-le do-dv-ni-yv-la-si da-gv-wa-s-go-ni-li na-s-gi; v-tla-ye-no hna-quo gi-lo yi-gv-wa-ni-wa-hi-se-ha ga-no-do-di;

271812.english: The merchandise of gold, and silver, and precious stones, and of pearls, and fine linen, and purple, and silk, and scarlet, and all thyine wood, and all manner vessels of ivory, and all manner vessels of most precious wood, and of brass, and iron, and marble,
271812.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏕᎸ-ᏓᎶᏂᎨ ᎦᏃᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏕᎸ-ᎤᏁᎬ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᏅᏯ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᎬᎾ-ᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏏᏙᎵ ᏙᎴᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏕᎭᎷᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏩᎾᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎩᎦᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎦᎥ ᏗᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᎠᏓ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏗᏖᎵᏙ ᎧᎹᎹ ᏧᏓᏄᏙᏅᎯ ᏗᎪᏢᏔᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏗᏖᎵᏙ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎠᏓ ᏗᎪᏢᏔᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏣᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏔᎷᎩᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏓᏫᏍᎦᎨ ᏅᏯ,
271812.phonetic: Na-s-gi a-de-lv--da-lo-ni-ge ga-no-do-di ge-sv-i, a-le a-de-lv--u-ne-gv, a-le u-tsa-ti tsu-gv-wa-lo-di nv-ya, a-le da-gv-na--i-yu-na-s-di, a-le u-si-do-li do-le-dv, a-le di-de-ha-lu-ge-i, a-le di-wa-na-ge-i, a-le di-gi-ga-ge-i, a-le na-ga-v di-ga-lv-quo-di a-da, a-le ni-ga-v di-te-li-do ka-ma-ma tsu-da-nu-do-nv-hi di-go-tlv-ta-nv-hi, a-le ni-ga-v di-te-li-do u-tsa-ti tsu-gv-wa-lo-di a-da di-go-tlv-ta-nv-hi, a-le v-tsa-yi, a-le ta-lu-gi-s-gi, a-le a-ni-da-wi-s-ga-ge nv-ya,

271813.english: And cinnamon, and odours, and ointments, and frankincense, and wine, and oil, and fine flour, and wheat, and beasts, and sheep, and horses, and chariots, and slaves, and souls of men.
271813.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏏᏂᎹᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎦᏩᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏠᏁᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏜᏓᎤᎦᎾᏍᏛ ᎦᏩᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎩᎦᎨ-ᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏩᎾᎨ ᎤᏣᎴᏍᏗ ᎢᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᎴᏍᏗᎤᎦᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎾᏝᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏫ-ᎤᏂᏃᏕᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᏐᏈᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏍᏗ-ᏓᏆᎴᎷ, ᎠᎴ ᏴᏫ-ᏗᎦᎾᏝᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏴᏫ ᏧᎾᏓᏅᏙ.
271813.phonetic: A-le si-ni-ma-ni, a-le di-ga-wa-sv-gi, a-le a-tlo-ne-di, a-le a-dla u-ga-na-s-dv ga-wa-sv-gi, a-le gi-ga-ge--a-di-ta-s-di, a-le go-i, a-le wa-na-ge u-tsa-le-s-di i-sv, a-le u-tsa-le-s-di-u-ga-dv, a-le ga-na-tla-i, a-le a-wi--u-ni-no-de-nv, a-le so-qui-li, a-le tsu-s-di--da-qua-le-lu, a-le yv-wi--di-ga-na-tla-i, a-le yv-wi tsu-na-da-nv-do.

271814.english: And the fruits that thy soul lusted after are departed from thee, and all things which were dainty and goodly are departed from thee, and thou shalt find them no more at all.
271814.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏔᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏣᏓᏅᏙ ᏧᎬᎥᏍᎬᎩ ᏣᏓᏅᎡᎸ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᏢᏉᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᏥᎨᏒ ᎨᏣᏓᏅᎡᎸ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏫᏗᎨᏣᏩᏛᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
271814.phonetic: A-le u-da-ta-nv-hi na-s-gi tsa-da-nv-do tsu-gv-v-s-gv-gi tsa-da-nv-e-lv, a-le ni-ga-v u-tlv-quo-di a-le di-ga-lv-quo-di tsi-ge-sv ge-tsa-da-nv-e-lv, a-le v-tla hna-quo wi-di-ge-tsa-wa-dv-di yi-ge-se-s-di.

271815.english: The merchants of these things, which were made rich by her, shall stand afar off for the fear of her torment, weeping and wailing,
271815.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏓᎴᏛ ᎠᏂᏃᏔᏅᎥᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏪᏅᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ, ᎢᏅ ᏗᏂᏙᎾᎡᏍᏗ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎩᎵᏲᎬ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᎢᎲᎢ, ᏓᎾᏠᏱᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏓᏂᏴᎨᏍᏗ,
271815.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi tsu-da-le-dv a-ni-no-ta-nv-v-s-gi, na-s-gi tsu-we-nv-i-s-ta-nv-hi, i-nv di-ni-do-na-e-s-di nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di a-gi-li-yo-gv a-ni-s-ga-i-hv-i, da-na-tlo-yi-he-s-di a-le da-ni-yv-ge-s-di,

271816.english: And saying, Alas, alas, that great city, that was clothed in fine linen, and purple, and scarlet, and decked with gold, and precious stones, and pearls!
271816.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎤᏲᏍᏛᏉ, ᎤᏲᏍᏛᏉ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎡᏆ ᎦᏚᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏏᏙᎵ ᏙᎴᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᎭᎷᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎩᎦᎨᎢ ᏥᏚᏣᏃᏛᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏕᎸᏓᎶᏂᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏧᎾᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᏅᏯ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᎬᎾ-ᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ, ᏥᏚᏣᏃᏛᎩ!
271816.phonetic: A-le hi-a na-ni-we-s-ge-s-di, U-yo-s-dv-quo, u-yo-s-dv-quo, na-s-gi na e-qua ga-du-hv na-s-gi u-si-do-li do-le-dv, a-le de-ha-lu-ge-i, a-le gi-ga-ge-i tsi-du-tsa-no-dv-gi, a-le a-de-lv-da-lo-ni-ge-i, a-le u-tsa-ti tsu-na-gv-wa-lo-di nv-ya, a-le da-gv-na--i-yu-na-s-di, tsi-du-tsa-no-dv-gi!

271817.english: For in one hour so great riches is come to nought. And every shipmaster, and all the company in ships, and sailors, and as many as trade by sea, stood afar off,
271817.cherokee: ᏑᏟᎶᏛᏉᏰᏃ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎦᎢ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎠᏎᏉ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂᏛ.  ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᏥᏳ ᏧᏔᏅ ᏓᏂᏂᏙᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏥᏳᎯ ᎤᎾᏣᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏳ ᏗᏂᏂᏙᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥᏉ ᎠᎺᏉᎯ ᎠᏂᏃᏔᏂᏙᎯ, ᎢᏅ ᏛᏂᏙᎾᎥᎩ,
271817.phonetic: Su-tli-lo-dv-quo-ye-no i-go-hi-dv na-s-gi i-ga-i tsu-gv-wa-lo-di a-se-quo ni-ga-li-s-ta-ni-dv.  A-le na-ni-v u-ni-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi tsi-yu tsu-ta-nv da-ni-ni-do-hv-i, a-le na-ni-v tsi-yu-hi u-na-tsa-i, a-le tsi-yu di-ni-ni-do-hi, a-le na-ni-v-quo a-me-quo-hi a-ni-no-ta-ni-do-hi, i-nv dv-ni-do-na-v-gi,

271818.english: And cried when they saw the smoke of her burning, saying, What city is like unto this great city!
271818.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎷᏅᎩ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎤᏂᎪᎲ ᏚᎦᏒᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎪᎲᏍᎬᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎬᎩ, ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎨᏎ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎡᏆ ᎦᏚᎲ ᏄᏍᏛᎢ?
271818.phonetic: A-le u-ne-lu-nv-gi i-yu-no u-ni-go-hv du-ga-sv-s-dv na-s-gi a-go-hv-s-gv-i, hi-a na-ni-we-s-gv-gi, Ga-do u-s-di na-s-gi-ya ge-se na-s-gi hi-a e-qua ga-du-hv nu-s-dv-i?

271819.english: And they cast dust on their heads, and cried, weeping and wailing, saying, Alas, alas, that great city, wherein were made rich all that had ships in the sea by reason of her costliness! for in one hour is she made desolate.
271819.cherokee: ᏗᏂᏍᎪᎵᏃ ᎪᏍᏚ ᏚᏂᏝᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎷᏅᎩ ᏓᎾᏠᏱᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᏂᏴᎬᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎬᎩ, ᎤᏲᏍᏛᏉ, ᎤᏲᏍᏛᏉ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎡᏆ ᎦᏚᎲᎢ, ᎾᎿᎭᏧᏁᎿᎭᎢ ᏥᏄᎾᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᎺᏉᎯ ᏥᏳ ᏗᏂᏂᏙᎯ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏪᎿᎭᎢᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏑᏟᎶᏛᏉᏰᏃ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ ᏅᏔ ᎾᎬᏁᎸ.
271819.phonetic: Di-ni-s-go-li-no go-s-du du-ni-tla-nv-gi, a-le u-ne-lu-nv-gi da-na-tlo-yi-hv-i, a-le da-ni-yv-gv-i, hi-a na-ni-we-s-gv-gi, U-yo-s-dv-quo, u-yo-s-dv-quo, na-s-gi na e-qua ga-du-hv-i, na-hna tsu-ne-hna-i tsi-nu-na-li-s-ta-nv-gi ni-ga-dv a-me-quo-hi tsi-yu di-ni-ni-do-hi, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv u-tsa-ti u-we-hna-i-yu ge-sv-i, su-tli-lo-dv-quo-ye-no i-go-hi-dv nv-ta na-gv-ne-lv.

271820.english: Rejoice over her, thou heaven, and ye holy apostles and prophets; for God hath avenged you on her.
271820.cherokee: ᎢᏣᎵᎮᎵᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎵᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᏂᎯ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏘ ᎠᎴ ᎡᏥᏅᏏᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᏂᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏞᏥ.
271820.phonetic: I-tsa-li-he-li-gi na-s-gi nu-li-s-da-ne-lv i-yu-s-di, ni-hi ga-lv-lo-i a-le ni-hi i-tsa-da-nv-ti a-le e-tsi-nv-si-dv, a-le i-tsa-do-le-ho-s-gi; U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no ni-hi ge-sv i-yu-s-di na-s-gi a-ga-tle-tsi.

271821.english: And a mighty angel took up a stone like a great millstone, and cast it into the sea, saying, Thus with violence shall that great city Babylon be thrown down, and shall be found no more at all.
271821.cherokee: ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛᏃ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏅᏯ ᎤᎩᏒᎩ, ᎤᏔᏅ ᏗᏍᏙᏍᎩ ᏅᏯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎠᎺᏉᎯᏃ ᏭᏗᏅᏒᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎬᏍᎦᎢᏍᏓᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎡᏆ ᎦᏚᎲ ᏓᏓᎶᏂ ᎠᏥᏲᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎬᏩᏛᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
271821.phonetic: U-li-ni-gi-dv-no di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi nv-ya u-gi-sv-gi, u-ta-nv di-s-do-s-gi nv-ya na-s-gi-ya-i, a-me-quo-hi-no wu-di-nv-sv-gi, hi-a nu-we-sv-gi, Na-s-gi-ya gv-s-ga-i-s-da-gi na-s-gi na e-qua ga-du-hv Da-da-lo-ni a-tsi-yo-s-do-di ge-se-s-di, v-tla a-le hna-quo gv-wa-dv-di yi-ge-se-s-di.

271822.english: And the voice of harpers, and musicians, and of pipers, and trumpeters, shall be heard no more at all in thee; and no craftsman, of whatsoever craft he be, shall be found any more in thee; and the sound of a millstone shall be heard no more at all in thee;
271822.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏗᎧᏃᎩᏍᏙᏗ ᏗᏂᏃᎩᏍᏗᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᏃᎩᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏦᏔᏍᏗ ᏗᏂᏃᎩᏍᏗᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᏤᎷᎯᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏓᏃᏴᎵᏍᏛ ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎡᏣᏛᎦᏁᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎢᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎪᏢᏅᎥᏍᎩ ᏄᏓᎴᏒᏉ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎪᏢᏍᎩ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏰᏣᏩᏛᎡᎴᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᏅᏯ ᎠᏍᏙᏍᎩ ᎤᏃᏴᎬ ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎡᏣᏛᎦᏁᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ;
271822.phonetic: A-le di-ka-no-gi-s-do-di di-ni-no-gi-s-di-s-gi, a-le di-ni-no-gi-s-gi, a-le a-tso-ta-s-di di-ni-no-gi-s-di-s-gi, a-le di-ni-tse-lu-hi-s-gi u-na-da-no-yv-li-s-dv v-tla hna-quo e-tsa-dv-ga-ne-di yi-ge-se-s-di; i-tla a-le go-tlv-nv-v-s-gi nu-da-le-sv-quo go-hu-s-di go-tlv-s-gi hna-quo ye-tsa-wa-dv-e-le-s-di; a-le nv-ya a-s-do-s-gi u-no-yv-gv v-tla hna-quo e-tsa-dv-ga-ne-di yi-ge-se-s-di;

271823.english: And the light of a candle shall shine no more at all in thee; and the voice of the bridegroom and of the bride shall be heard no more at all in thee: for thy merchants were the great men of the earth; for by thy sorceries were all nations deceived.
271823.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏨᏍᏙᏗ ᏚᎸᏌᏛ ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏗᏣᎸᏌᏓᏕᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᎠᏕᏒᎲᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᏰᎯ ᎠᏂᏁᎬ ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎡᏣᏛᎦᏁᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᏗᏣᏤᎵᏰᏃ ᎠᏂᏃᏗᏍᎩ ᎨᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᎨᏒᎩ ᏴᏫ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏓᏁᏩᏗᏒᎢ; ᏂᎦᏗᏳᏰᏃ ᎤᎾᏓᏤᎵᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏴᏫ ᏓᏁᏩᏗᏒ ᎠᏙᏅᏗ ᏕᏣᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᏕᎯᎶᏄᎮᏔᏅᎩ.
271823.phonetic: A-le a-tsv-s-do-di du-lv-sa-dv v-tla hna-quo di-tsa-lv-sa-da-de-di yi-ge-se-s-di; a-le a-de-sv-hv-s-gi a-le a-tsi-ye-hi a-ni-ne-gv v-tla hna-quo e-tsa-dv-ga-ne-di yi-ge-se-s-di; di-tsa-tse-li-ye-no a-ni-no-di-s-gi ge-tsi-lv-quo-di ge-sv-gi yv-wi e-lo-hi da-ne-wa-di-sv-i; ni-ga-di-yu-ye-no u-na-da-tse-li-dv ge-sv yv-wi da-ne-wa-di-sv a-do-nv-di de-tsa-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv de-hi-lo-nu-he-ta-nv-gi.

271824.english: And in her was found the blood of prophets, and of saints, and of all that were slain upon the earth.
271824.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᏩᏛᎡᎸᎩ ᎤᏂᎩᎬ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏗᎨᏥᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
271824.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi a-tsi-wa-dv-e-lv-gi u-ni-gi-gv a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi, a-le u-na-da-nv-ti, a-le ni-ga-dv e-lo-hi di-ge-tsi-lv-hi ge-sv-i.

271901.english: And after these things I heard a great voice of much people in heaven, saying, Alleluia; Salvation, and glory, and honour, and power, unto the Lord our God:
271901.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎸ ᎠᏆᏛᎦᏅᎩ ᎠᏍᏓᏯ ᎠᏂᏁᎬ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏴᏫ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎢᏴᏛ, ᎯᎠ ᏅᏛᏂᏪᏍᎬᎩ, ᏱᎰᏩ ᎡᏗᎸᏉᏓ; ᎠᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎠᏥᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏁᎳᏅᎯ;
271901.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no nu-li-s-ta-ni-do-lv a-qua-dv-ga-nv-gi a-s-da-ya a-ni-ne-gv u-ni-tsa-ti yv-wi ga-lv-la-di i-yv-dv, hi-a nv-dv-ni-we-s-gv-gi, Yi-ho-wa e-di-lv-quo-da; a-li-s-de-lv-do-di ge-sv-i, a-le a-tsi-lv-quo-do-di ge-sv-i, a-le o-s-dv a-tsi-ye-lv-di ge-sv-i, a-le u-li-ni-gi-dv ge-sv-i, u-tse-li-ga ge-se-s-di U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-ne-la-nv-hi;

271902.english: For true and righteous are his judgments: for he hath judged the great whore, which did corrupt the earth with her fornication, and hath avenged the blood of his servants at her hand.
271902.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏧᏭᎪᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏚᏳᎪᏛᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏚᏭᎪᏓᏁᎸ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏁᎫᏥᏛ ᎠᎨᏴ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᏓᏂᏏᏂᏙᎲ ᎤᏂᏲ ᏥᏂᏚᏩᏁᎸ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏁᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏞᏨ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᎩᎬ ᏚᏨᏁᎸᎢ.
271902.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no tsu-wu-go-do-di ge-sv du-yu-go-dv-i a-le o-s-dv; na-s-gi-ye-no du-wu-go-da-ne-lv u-tsa-ti u-ne-gu-tsi-dv a-ge-yv, na-s-gi u-de-li-dv da-ni-si-ni-do-hv u-ni-yo tsi-ni-du-wa-ne-lv e-lo-hi a-ne-hi, a-le u-tle-tsv tsu-nv-si-da-s-di u-ni-gi-gv du-tsv-ne-lv-i.

271903.english: And again they said, Alleluia. And her smoke rose up for ever and ever.
271903.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏱᎰᏩ ᎡᏗᎸᏉᏓ ᎤᎾᏛᏅᎩ.  ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏧᎦᏒᏍᏗ ᏓᎴᎲᏍᎬᎩ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎢ.
271903.phonetic: A-le ta-li-ne Yi-ho-wa e-di-lv-quo-da u-na-dv-nv-gi.  A-le na-s-gi u-tse-li tsu-ga-sv-s-di da-le-hv-s-gv-gi ni-go-hi-lv a-le ni-go-hi-lv-i.

271904.english: And the four and twenty elders and the four beasts fell down and worshipped God that sat on the throne, saying, Amen; Alleluia.
271904.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ Ꮎ ᏅᎩᏦᏁ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᏧᎾᏛᏐᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ Ꮎ ᏅᎩ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᏗᏅᏃᏛ ᎡᎳᏗ ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎸᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏍᎩᎸ ᎤᏪᎵ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎬᎩ, ᎡᎺᏅ; ᏱᎰᏩ ᎡᏗᎸᏉᏓ.
271904.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no na nv-gi-tso-ne i-ya-ni-dv tsu-na-dv-so-nv-hi, a-le na nv-gi i-ya-ni-dv di-nv-no-dv e-la-di du-na-da-nv-nv-gi, a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi u-na-da-do-li-s-da-ne-lv-gi, na-s-gi ga-s-gi-lv u-we-li, hi-a na-ni-we-s-gv-gi, E-me-nv; Yi-ho-wa e-di-lv-quo-da.

271905.english: And a voice came out of the throne, saying, Praise our God, all ye his servants, and ye that fear him, both small and great.
271905.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎧᏁᎬ ᎦᏍᎩᎸ ᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬᎩ, ᎡᏥᎸᏉᏓ ᎣᎦᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏂᎯ ᏂᏥᎥ ᎢᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᎡᏥᎾᏰᏍᎩ ᏥᎩ, ᏗᏣᏍᏗᎦ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏣᏔᏅ.
271905.phonetic: A-le gi-lo ka-ne-gv ga-s-gi-lv da-yu-da-le-nv-gi, hi-a ni-ga-we-s-gv-gi, E-tsi-lv-quo-da O-ga-ne-la-nv-hi ni-hi ni-tsi-v i-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di tsi-gi, a-le ni-hi e-tsi-na-ye-s-gi tsi-gi, di-tsa-s-di-ga a-le di-tsa-ta-nv.

271906.english: And I heard as it were the voice of a great multitude, and as the voice of many waters, and as the voice of mighty thunderings, saying, Alleluia: for the Lord God omnipotent reigneth.
271906.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏆᏛᎦᏅᎩ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏣᏂᏁᎪ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎠᎹ ᏧᏍᏆᏃᏴᎪ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏓᏴᏓᏆᎶᏍᎬ ᏥᏚᏍᏆᏃᏴᎪ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎬᎩ, ᏱᎰᏩ ᎡᏗᎸᏉᏓ; ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎦ.
271906.phonetic: A-le a-qua-dv-ga-nv-gi u-ni-tsa-ti tsa-ni-ne-go na-s-gi-ya-i, a-le u-tsa-ti a-ma tsu-s-qua-no-yv-go na-s-gi-ya-i, a-le u-tsa-ti da-yv-da-qua-lo-s-gv tsi-du-s-qua-no-yv-go na-s-gi-ya-i, hi-a na-ni-we-s-gv-gi, Yi-ho-wa e-di-lv-quo-da; U-gv-wi-yu-hi-ye-no U-ne-la-nv-hi Wi-na-s-dv-na u-li-ni-gi-dv u-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-ga.

271907.english: Let us be glad and rejoice, and give honour to him: for the marriage of the Lamb is come, and his wife hath made herself ready.
271907.cherokee: ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏓᏓᏅᏓᏓ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏓᎵᎮᎵᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏗᎸᏉᏓ; ᎤᏃᏕᎾᏰᏃ-ᎠᎩᎾ ᏣᎦᏨᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏍᏆᎸ, ᎤᏓᎵᎢᏃ ᎠᏛᏅᎢᏍᏔᏃᎾ.
271907.phonetic: O-s-dv i-da-da-nv-da-da a-le i-da-li-he-li-gi, a-le na-s-gi e-di-lv-quo-da; U-no-de-na-ye-no--a-gi-na tsa-ga-tsv-s-do-di-yi a-s-qua-lv, u-da-li-i-no a-dv-nv-i-s-ta-no-na.

271908.english: And to her was granted that she should be arrayed in fine linen, clean and white: for the fine linen is the righteousness of saints.
271908.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸᎩ ᎤᏏᏙᎵ ᏙᎴᏛ ᏧᏄᏬᏍᏗᏱ, ᏗᎦᏓᎭ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎠᎴ ᏧᏁᎬ; ᎤᏏᏙᎵᏰᏃ ᏙᎴᏛ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏄᎾᏛᏁᎵᏙᎸ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᎦᏛᎦ.
271908.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi a-ga-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv-gi u-si-do-li do-le-dv tsu-nu-wo-s-di-yi, di-ga-da-ha ni-ge-sv-na a-le tsu-ne-gv; u-si-do-li-ye-no do-le-dv du-yu-go-dv nu-na-dv-ne-li-do-lv u-na-da-nv-ti ga-dv-ga.

271909.english: And he saith unto me, Write, Blessed are they which are called unto the marriage supper of the Lamb. And he saith unto me, These are the true sayings of God.
271909.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᎩᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᎰᏪᎸᎦ, (ᎯᎠᏅᎦ,) ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏃᏕᎾ-ᎠᎩᎾ ᏣᎦᏨᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏧᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏂᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎨᏥᏯᏅᏛ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.  ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᎩᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎢᏳᏪᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
271909.phonetic: Hi-a-no na-gi-we-se-lv-gi, Ho-we-lv-ga, (hi-a-nv-ga,) O-si-yu i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di na-s-gi na U-no-de-na--a-gi-na tsa-ga-tsv-s-do-di-yi tsu-na-li-s-da-yv-di-yi ge-sv u-ni-lu-hi-s-di-yi ge-tsi-ya-nv-dv ge-se-s-di.  Hi-a-no na-gi-we-se-lv-gi, hi-a na-s-gi u-do-hi-yu-hi i-yu-we-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi.

271910.english: And I fell at his feet to worship him. And he said unto me, See thou do it not: I am thy fellowservant, and of thy brethren that have the testimony of Jesus: worship God: for the testimony of Jesus is the spirit of prophecy.
271910.cherokee: ᏚᎳᏍᎬᏃ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏅᎩ ᏓᏥᏯᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎵᏒᎩ.  ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᎩᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᎥᏞᏍᏗ.  ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᎤᏠᏱᏉ ᎡᎩᏂᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᎵᏅᏟ ᏥᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎪᎯᏳᏗᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎯ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎯᏯᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏏ; ᎠᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏙᏗᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎠᎴ ᏥᏌ ᎪᎯᏳᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏠᏱᏉ.
271910.phonetic: Du-la-s-gv-no a-qua-da-nv-nv-gi da-tsi-ya-da-do-li-s-da-ne-li-sv-gi.  Hi-a-no na-gi-we-se-lv-gi, V-tle-s-di.  A-yv-ye-no u-tlo-yi-quo e-gi-ni-nv-si-da-s-di, a-le a-yv na-s-gi i-tsa-li-nv-tli tsi-ge-sv na-s-gi Tsi-sa u-tse-li go-hi-yu-di-s-gi u-ni-hi; U-ne-la-nv-hi hi-ya-da-do-li-s-da-si; a-do-le-ho-hi-s-do-di-ye-no ge-sv a-da-nv-do a-le Tsi-sa go-hi-yu-da-ne-di-yi u-tlo-yi-quo.

271911.english: And I saw heaven opened, and behold a white horse; and he that sat upon him was called Faithful and True, and in righteousness he doth judge and make war.
271911.cherokee: ᎠᎩᎪᎲᎩᏃ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᎤᎵᏍᏚᎢᏛ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎤᏁᎬ ᏐᏈᎵ (ᎥᏥᎪᎥᎩ;) ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᎩᎵ, ᏄᏓᎵᏓᏍᏛᎾ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ (ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎯ) ᎠᎪᏎᎲᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᏕᎫᎪᏗᎭ ᎠᎴ ᏓᎿᎭᏩ ᎪᏢᏍᎦ.
271911.phonetic: A-gi-go-hv-gi-no ga-lv-lo-i u-li-s-du-i-dv ge-sv-gi, a-le gv-ni-yu-quo u-ne-gv so-qui-li (v-tsi-go-v-gi;) a-le na-s-gi na-hna u-gi-li, Nu-da-li-da-s-dv-na A-le Du-yu-go-dv (i-ya-dv-ne-hi) a-go-se-hv-gi, a-le du-yu-go-dv gv-di-s-gv de-gu-go-di-ha a-le da-hna-wa go-tlv-s-ga.

271912.english: His eyes were as a flame of fire, and on his head were many crowns; and he had a name written, that no man knew, but he himself.
271912.cherokee: ᏗᎦᏙᎵ ᎠᏥᎸ ᎠᏓᏪᎵᎩᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎠᏍᎪᎵᏃ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏚᎵᏍᏚᎸᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᏚᏙᎥ ᎪᏪᎸᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎶ ᎬᏬᎵᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎤᏩᏒᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎪᎵᎬᎩ.
271912.phonetic: Di-ga-do-li a-tsi-lv a-da-we-li-gi-s-gi na-s-gi-ya ge-sv-gi, a-s-go-li-no u-tsa-ti du-li-s-du-lv-gi; a-le du-do-v go-we-lv-gi na-s-gi gi-lo gv-wo-li-s-di ni-ge-sv-na u-wa-sv-s-gi-ni-no-nv go-li-gv-gi.

271913.english: And he was clothed with a vesture dipped in blood: and his name is called The Word of God.
271913.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎩᎬᎯ ᎬᏅᎯ ᎠᏄᏬ ᎤᏄᏩᎥᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎠᎪᏎᎭ ᎠᏥᏯᏂᏍᎬᎢ.
271913.phonetic: A-le gi-gv-hi gv-nv-hi a-nu-wo u-nu-wa-v-gi; a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi U-tse-li Ka-no-he-dv a-go-se-ha a-tsi-ya-ni-s-gv-i.

271914.english: And the armies which were in heaven followed him upon white horses, clothed in fine linen, white and clean.
271914.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏯᏫᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏛᏒᎩ ᎤᏂᏁᎬ ᏐᏈᎵ ᏧᎾᎩᎸᏗ, ᏧᏏᏙᎵ ᏙᎴᏛ ᏗᏄᏬ ᏚᎾᏄᏬᏍᏛᎩ, ᏧᏁᎬ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎦᏓᎭ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
271914.phonetic: A-le a-ni-ya-wi-s-gi ga-lv-la-di a-ne-hv gv-wa-s-da-wa-dv-sv-gi u-ni-ne-gv so-qui-li tsu-na-gi-lv-di, tsu-si-do-li do-le-dv di-nu-wo du-na-nu-wo-s-dv-gi, tsu-ne-gv a-le di-ga-da-ha ni-ge-sv-na.

271915.english: And out of his mouth goeth a sharp sword, that with it he should smite the nations: and he shall rule them with a rod of iron: and he treadeth the winepress of the fierceness and wrath of Almighty God.
271915.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᎰᎵ ᏗᎦᏄᎪᎦ ᎪᏍᏓᏯ ᎭᏰᎳᏍᏗᎦᏅᎯᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏩᏂᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᏓᏤᎵᏛ ᏴᏫ ᏓᏁᏩᏗᏒᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᏔᎷᎩᏍᎩ ᎬᏗ ᏗᎬᏩᏁᎶᏙᏗᏱ ᏅᏓᎬᏁᎵ; ᎠᎴ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᎦᏨᏩᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᎳᏍᏓᎡᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏓᏑᏱ ᎤᏍᎦᏎᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ.
271915.phonetic: A-le a-ho-li di-ga-nu-go-ga go-s-da-ya ha-ye-la-s-di-ga-nv-hi-dv, na-s-gi tsu-wa-ni-s-do-di-yi u-na-da-tse-li-dv yv-wi da-ne-wa-di-sv-i; a-le ta-lu-gi-s-gi gv-di di-gv-wa-ne-lo-do-di-yi nv-da-gv-ne-li; a-le te-lv-la-di ga-tsv-wa-s-do-di-yi a-la-s-da-e-ha na-s-gi u-da-su-yi u-s-ga-se-di a-le u-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di ge-sv Wi-na-s-dv-na u-li-ni-gi-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga.

271916.english: And he hath on his vesture and on his thigh a name written, KING OF KINGS, AND LORD OF LORDS.
271916.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏄᏬᎩᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎦᎶᎢ ᏧᏙᏍᏙᏗ ᎪᏪᎸᎩ, (ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏅᎩ,) ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᎠᏁᎲ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ.
271916.phonetic: A-le u-nu-wo-gi-hi a-le ga-ga-lo-i tsu-do-s-do-di go-we-lv-gi, (hi-a ni-gv-nv-gi,) Nu-Ni-Gv-Wi-Yu-Sa-De-Gi A-Ne-Hv Nu-Gv-Wi-Yu-Sa-De-Gi, A-Le U-Ni-Gv-Wi-Yu-Hi A-Ne-Hv U-Gv-Wi-Yu-Hi.

271917.english: And I saw an angel standing in the sun; and he cried with a loud voice, saying to all the fowls that fly in the midst of heaven, Come and gather yourselves together unto the supper of the great God;
271917.cherokee: ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᎥᏥᎪᎥᎩ ᏅᏙ ᎢᎦᎡᎯ ᎧᎸ ᎬᏙᎬᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᎷᏅᎩ ᎠᏍᏓᏯ ᎤᏁᏨᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ ᎾᎯᎥ ᏥᏍᏆ ᎦᎸᎶ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎠᏂᏃᎯᎵᏙᎯ, ᎡᏤᎾ ᎢᏣᏓᏟᏌ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎨᏒᎢ;
271917.phonetic: Di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi-no v-tsi-go-v-gi nv-do i-ga-e-hi ka-lv gv-do-gv-gi; a-le u-we-lu-nv-gi a-s-da-ya u-ne-tsv-gi, hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi na-hi-v tsi-s-qua ga-lv-lo a-ye-li a-ni-no-hi-li-do-hi, E-tse-na i-tsa-da-tli-sa a-tsi-lv-quo-di U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li a-li-s-da-yv-di-yi ge-sv-i;

271918.english: That ye may eat the flesh of kings, and the flesh of captains, and the flesh of mighty men, and the flesh of horses, and of them that sit on them, and the flesh of all men, both free and bond, both small and great.
271918.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᎩᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏂᏇᏓᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏰᎬᏍᏓ ᎤᏂᏇᏓᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᏂᏇᏓᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏐᏈᎵ ᎤᏂᏇᏓᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏧᎾᎩᎸᏗ, ᏂᏗᎨᏥᎾᏝᎥᎾ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎨᏥᎾᏝᎢ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᏧᎾᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᏔᏅ.
271918.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-tsi-gi-s-di-yi u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi u-ni-que-da-lv-i, a-le a-ni-s-ga-ye-gv-s-da u-ni-que-da-lv-i, a-le tsu-na-li-ni-gi-dv a-ni-s-ga-ya u-ni-que-da-lv-i, a-le so-qui-li u-ni-que-da-lv-i, a-le na-s-gi na tsu-na-gi-lv-di, ni-di-ge-tsi-na-tla-v-na a-le di-ge-tsi-na-tla-i, na-s-quo tsu-na-s-di a-le tsu-na-ta-nv.

271919.english: And I saw the beast, and the kings of the earth, and their armies, gathered together to make war against him that sat on the horse, and against his army.
271919.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏅᎩ-ᏗᎦᏅᏌᏗ ᎥᏥᎪᎥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏓᏁᏩᏗᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎾᏤᎵ ᎠᏂᏯᏫᏍᎩ, ᎤᎾᏓᏟᏌᏅᎩ ᏓᎿᎭᏩ ᎢᏳᏅᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏒᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏐᏈᎵᎯ ᎤᎩᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏤᎵ ᎠᏂᏯᏫᏍᎩ.
271919.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi na nv-gi--di-ga-nv-sa-di v-tsi-go-v-gi, a-le u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi e-lo-hi da-ne-wa-di-sv-i, a-le na-s-gi tsu-na-tse-li a-ni-ya-wi-s-gi, u-na-da-tli-sa-nv-gi da-hna-wa i-yu-nv-ne-di-yi u-ni-ye-lv-sv-gi na-s-gi na so-qui-li-hi u-gi-li, a-le na-s-gi tsu-tse-li a-ni-ya-wi-s-gi.

271920.english: And the beast was taken, and with him the false prophet that wrought miracles before him, with which he deceived them that had received the mark of the beast, and them that worshipped his image. These both were cast alive into a lake of fire burning with brimstone.
271920.cherokee: ᏅᎩᏃ-ᏗᎦᏅᏌᏗ ᎠᏥᏴᎩᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏠᏯᏍᏔᏅᎩ ᎤᏠᎾᏍᏗ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏔᎲ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏥᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏕᎦᎶᏄᎮᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏅᎩ-ᏗᎦᏅᏌᏗ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᏓᏰᎸᏙᏗ ᏗᎨᏥᏰᎸᏔᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏣᎦᏟᎶᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎯ.  ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏧᎳ ᏗᎬᏅᏃᏛ ᏫᏕᎨᎦᏓᎢᏅᏒᎩ ᎠᏥᎸ ᏨᏓᎸ ᎾᎿᎭᏌᎪᏂᎨ ᎠᏓᏪᎳᎩᏍᎩ ᏗᏓᏪᎳᎩᏍᎬᎢ.
271920.phonetic: Nv-gi-no--di-ga-nv-sa-di a-tsi-yv-gi-nv-gi, a-le a-ga-tlo-ya-s-ta-nv-gi u-tlo-na-s-di a-do-le-ho-s-gi na-s-gi a-ga-ta-hv u-s-qua-ni-go-di tsi-du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-gi, na-s-gi tsi-de-ga-lo-nu-he-di-s-gv-gi na-s-gi na nv-gi--di-ga-nv-sa-di u-tse-li u-da-ye-lv-do-di di-ge-tsi-ye-lv-ta-nv-hi, a-le na-s-gi na tsa-ga-tli-lo-s-ta-nv-hi a-na-da-do-li-s-da-ne-hi.  Hi-a na-s-gi i-tsu-la di-gv-nv-no-dv wi-de-ge-ga-da-i-nv-sv-gi a-tsi-lv tsv-da-lv na-hna sa-go-ni-ge a-da-we-la-gi-s-gi di-da-we-la-gi-s-gv-i.

271921.english: And the remnant were slain with the sword of him that sat upon the horse, which sword proceeded out of his mouth: and all the fowls were filled with their flesh.
271921.cherokee: ᎤᎾᎵᏃᎯᏴᎯᏃ ᎭᏰᎳᏍᏗ-ᎦᏅᎯᏛ ᏐᏈᎵᎯ ᎤᎩᎵ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᏕᎨᏥᎢᏍᏔᏅᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎰᎵ ᏨᏓᎦᏄᎪᎬᎩ; ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᏥᏍᏆ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏇᏓᎸ ᏚᏃᎸᎯᏍᏔᏅᎩ.
271921.phonetic: U-na-li-no-hi-yv-hi-no ha-ye-la-s-di--ga-nv-hi-dv so-qui-li-hi u-gi-li u-tse-li-ga de-ge-tsi-i-s-ta-nv-gi, na-s-gi a-ho-li tsv-da-ga-nu-go-gv-gi; ni-ga-dv-no tsi-s-qua na-s-gi u-ni-que-da-lv du-no-lv-hi-s-ta-nv-gi.

272001.english: And I saw an angel come down from heaven, having the key of the bottomless pit and a great chain in his hand.
272001.cherokee: ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᎥᏥᎪᎥᎩ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏓᏳᏠᎠᏒᎩ, ᎦᏁᎲᎩ ᎠᏍᏚᎢᏍᏗ ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎠᏔᎴᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎡᏆ ᏧᏓᏕᏒᏛ ᎤᏒᎦᎸᎩ.
272001.phonetic: Di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi-no v-tsi-go-v-gi ga-lv-la-di da-yu-tlo-a-sv-gi, ga-ne-hv-gi a-s-du-i-s-di wi-na-s-dv-na a-ta-le-sv-i, a-le u-tsa-ti e-qua tsu-da-de-sv-dv u-sv-ga-lv-gi.

272002.english: And he laid hold on the dragon, that old serpent, which is the Devil, and Satan, and bound him a thousand years,
272002.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏴᎲᎩᏃ ᎢᎾᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏴᎵ ᎢᎾᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᎠᎴ ᏎᏓᏂ ᏣᎪᏎᎰᎢ, ᏌᏉᏃ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᎢᏧᏕᏘᏴᏛ ᎠᎦᎸᎸᎩ,
272002.phonetic: U-ni-yv-hv-gi-no i-na-dv, na-s-gi a-ga-yv-li i-na-dv, na-s-gi A-s-gi-na a-le Se-da-ni tsa-go-se-ho-i, sa-quo-no i-ya-ga-yv-li i-tsu-de-ti-yv-dv a-ga-lv-lv-gi,

272003.english: And cast him into the bottomless pit, and shut him up, and set a seal upon him, that he should deceive the nations no more, till the thousand years should be fulfilled: and after that he must be loosed a little season.
272003.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᏗᏔᎴᏒ ᏩᎦᏓᎢᏅᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᏍᏚᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏰᎸᏔᏅᎩ ᎠᏍᏚᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎬᏩᎶᏄᎮᏗ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᏓᏁᏩᏗᏒᎢ, ᎬᏂ ᏌᏉ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᎢᏧᏕᏘᏴᏛ ᏳᎶᏐᏅ; ᎣᏂᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᏥᎪᏗ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏞᎦ.
272003.phonetic: A-le wi-na-s-dv-na di-ta-le-sv wa-ga-da-i-nv-sv-gi, a-le a-tsi-s-du-nv-gi, a-le u-ye-lv-ta-nv-gi a-s-du-hv-i, na-s-gi di-gv-wa-lo-nu-he-di hna-quo ni-ge-sv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi da-ne-wa-di-sv-i, gv-ni sa-quo i-ya-ga-yv-li i-tsu-de-ti-yv-dv yu-lo-so-nv; o-ni-no hna-quo a-tsi-go-di i-ge-se-s-di tle-ga.

272004.english: And I saw thrones, and they sat upon them, and judgment was given unto them: and I saw the souls of them that were beheaded for the witness of Jesus, and for the word of God, and which had not worshipped the beast, neither his image, neither had received his mark upon their foreheads, or in their hands; and they lived and reigned with Christ a thousand years.
272004.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏓᎩᎪᎲ ᏕᎦᏍᎩᎸᎢ, ᎾᎿᎭᏃ ᎤᎾᏅᏅᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏧᏄᎪᏙᏗᏱ ᎥᎨᎦᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᏙᏥᎪᎥᎩ ᏧᎾᏓᏅᏙ ᏗᎨ ᏥᏍᎫᏕᏒᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎠᏂᏃᎮᏍᎬ ᎤᏂᏍᏛᏛᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎠᏂᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏅᎩ-ᏗᎦᏅᏌᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏣᎦᏟᎶᏍᏔᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎨᎪᏪᎳᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏗᏂᎬᏓᎨᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏃᏰᏂ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎠᏁᎲᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎥᎨᏒᎩ ᏌᏉ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᎢᏧᏕᏘᏴᏛ.
272004.phonetic: A-le da-gi-go-hv de-ga-s-gi-lv-i, na-hna-no u-na-nv-nv-gi a-le tsu-nu-go-do-di-yi v-ge-ga-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv-gi; a-le do-tsi-go-v-gi tsu-na-da-nv-do di-ge tsi-s-gu-de-sv-hi na-s-gi Tsi-sa a-ni-no-he-s-gv u-ni-s-dv-dv-hi a-le ka-no-he-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li a-ni-no-he-s-gv-i, a-le na-s-gi u-na-da-do-li-s-da-ne-lv-hi ni-ge-sv-na nv-gi--di-ga-nv-sa-di, a-le na-s-gi tsa-ga-tli-lo-s-ta-nv-hi, a-le di-ge-go-we-la-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na di-ni-gv-da-ge-ni, a-le tsu-no-ye-ni; a-le na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv i-tsu-la-ha a-ne-hv-gi a-le u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi v-ge-sv-gi sa-quo i-ya-ga-yv-li i-tsu-de-ti-yv-dv.

272005.english: But the rest of the dead lived not again until the thousand years were finished. This is the first resurrection.
272005.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏐᎢᏍᎩᏂ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎥᏝ ᏯᏁᎮ ᎬᏂ ᏌᏉ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᎢᏧᏕᏘᏴᏛ ᏚᎶᏐᏅ.  ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᏗᎴᎯᏐᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
272005.phonetic: A-ni-so-i-s-gi-ni tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi v-tla ya-ne-he gv-ni sa-quo i-ya-ga-yv-li i-tsu-de-ti-yv-dv du-lo-so-nv.  Hi-a na-s-gi i-gv-yi-yi di-le-hi-so-di ge-sv-i.

272006.english: Blessed and holy is he that hath part in the first resurrection: on such the second death hath no power, but they shall be priests of God and of Christ, and shall reign with him a thousand years.
272006.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏪᎳᏗᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᏗᎴᎯᏐᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏴᎬᏩᏅᎦ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏥᎸᏍᎩᏂ-ᏗᏁᎶᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎠᎴ [ᎦᎶᏁᏛ] ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏌᏉ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᎢᏧᏕᏘᏴᏛ.
272006.phonetic: O-si-yu i-yu-li-s-da-ne-di a-le na-s-ga-nv-na na-s-gi na u-we-la-di-s-di-s-gi i-gv-yi-yi di-le-hi-so-di ge-sv-i; na-s-gi v-tla go-hu-s-di yv-gv-wa-nv-ga ta-li-ne a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, a-tsi-lv-s-gi-ni--di-ne-lo-hi ge-se-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi a-le Ga-lo-ne-dv, a-le [Ga-lo-ne-dv] i-tsu-la-ha u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-se-s-di sa-quo i-ya-ga-yv-li i-tsu-de-ti-yv-dv.

272007.english: And when the thousand years are expired, Satan shall be loosed out of his prison,
272007.cherokee: ᏌᏉᏃ ᎢᏯᎦᏴᎵ ᎢᏧᏕᏘᏴᏛ ᎦᎶᏐᏅ, ᏎᏓᏂ ᏛᎠᏥᎧᏂ ᏛᎠᏥᏄᎪᏫᏏ ᎠᏥᏍᏚᎲᎢ;
272007.phonetic: Sa-quo-no i-ya-ga-yv-li i-tsu-de-ti-yv-dv ga-lo-so-nv, Se-da-ni dv-a-tsi-ka-ni dv-a-tsi-nu-go-wi-si a-tsi-s-du-hv-i;

272008.english: And shall go out to deceive the nations which are in the four quarters of the earth, Gog and Magog, to gather them together to battle: the number of whom is as the sand of the sea.
272008.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏛᎡᏙᎵ ᏧᎶᏄᎮᏗᏱ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᎩ ᏂᏚᏓᎠᏗᏒ ᏓᏁᏩᏗᏒᎢ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏣᏁᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎦ ᎠᎴ ᎺᎪᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏪᏟᏐᏗᏱ ᏧᎾᎵᏍᏗᏱ; ᎾᏂᎥᏃ ᏃᏳ ᎠᎺᏉᎯ ᎠᎲ ᎾᏂᎥ.
272008.phonetic: A-le dv-e-do-li tsu-lo-nu-he-di-yi tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi na-s-gi nv-gi ni-du-da-a-di-sv da-ne-wa-di-sv-i e-lo-hi tsa-ne-ha na-s-gi Go-ga a-le Me-go-ga, na-s-gi tsu-we-tli-so-di-yi tsu-na-li-s-di-yi; na-ni-v-no no-yu a-me-quo-hi a-hv na-ni-v.

272009.english: And they went up on the breadth of the earth, and compassed the camp of the saints about, and the beloved city: and fire came down from God out of heaven, and devoured them.
272009.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏂᎬᎾᏛ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᏁᏙᎸᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᎾᏚᏫᏍᏔᏅᎩ ᎠᏂᏅ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎠᏰᎸᏗ ᎦᏚᎲᎢ; ᎠᏥᎸᏃ ᎤᎯᎳᏅᎯᏱ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏛᎤᎶᏒᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏂᎰᏅᎩ.
272009.phonetic: A-le ni-gv-na-dv e-lo-hi u-ne-do-lv-gi, a-le du-na-du-wi-s-ta-nv-gi a-ni-nv u-na-da-nv-ti, a-le o-s-dv a-ye-lv-di ga-du-hv-i; a-tsi-lv-no U-hi-la-nv-hi-yi ga-lv-la-di dv-u-lo-sv-gi a-le du-ni-ho-nv-gi.

272010.english: And the devil that deceived them was cast into the lake of fire and brimstone, where the beast and the false prophet are, and shall be tormented day and night for ever and ever.
272010.cherokee: ᎠᏍᎩᎾᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎶᏄᎮᎸᎯ ᎠᏥᎸ ᎠᎴ ᏌᎪᏂᎨ ᎠᏓᏪᎳᎩᏍᎩ ᎥᏓᎸ ᏩᎦᏓᎢᏅᏒᎩ, ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏁᎲ ᏅᎩ-ᏗᎦᏅᏌᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏠᎾᏍᏗ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎨᏥᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎢ.
272010.phonetic: A-s-gi-na-no na-s-gi u-ni-lo-nu-he-lv-hi a-tsi-lv a-le sa-go-ni-ge a-da-we-la-gi-s-gi v-da-lv wa-ga-da-i-nv-sv-gi, na-hna a-ne-hv nv-gi--di-ga-nv-sa-di a-le u-tlo-na-s-di a-do-le-ho-s-gi, a-le ge-tsi-gi-li-yo-i-s-do-di ge-se-s-di ni-go-hi-lv a-le ni-go-hi-lv-i.

272011.english: And I saw a great white throne, and him that sat on it, from whose face the earth and the heaven fled away; and there was found no place for them.
272011.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᎪᎲᎩ ᎡᏆ ᎤᏁᎬ ᎦᏍᎩᎶ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏬᎵ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎧᏛᎢ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᎬᏩᎵᎡᎸᎩ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎢᎸᎯᏢ ᎬᏩᎵᎡᎸᎩ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎢᎸᎯᏢ ᎬᏩᏛᏗ ᏱᎨᏎ ᏭᏂᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ.
272011.phonetic: A-le a-gi-go-hv-gi e-qua u-ne-gv ga-s-gi-lo, a-le na-s-gi na-hna u-wo-li, na-s-gi u-ka-dv-i e-lo-hi a-le ga-lv-lo-i gv-wa-li-e-lv-gi, v-tla a-le i-lv-hi-tlv gv-wa-li-e-lv-gi, v-tla a-le i-lv-hi-tlv gv-wa-dv-di yi-ge-se wu-ni-lo-hi-s-di-yi.

272012.english: And I saw the dead, small and great, stand before God; and the books were opened: and another book was opened, which is the book of life: and the dead were judged out of those things which were written in the books, according to their works.
272012.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎥᎦᏥᎪᎥᎩ, ᏧᎾᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᏛᎾ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏬᎸ ᎢᎬᏱᏗᏢ ᏚᎾᎴᏅᎩ; ᎪᏪᎵᏃ ᏚᏂᏍᏚᎢᏒᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎤᏂᏍᏚᎢᏒᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᏓᏁᎯ ᏥᎩ; ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯᏃ ᏙᎨᎫᎪᏓᏁᎸᎩ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎸ ᎪᏪᎵᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ.
272012.phonetic: A-le tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi v-ga-tsi-go-v-gi, tsu-na-s-di a-le tsu-na-dv-na, U-ne-la-nv-hi u-wo-lv i-gv-yi-di-tlv du-na-le-nv-gi; go-we-li-no du-ni-s-du-i-sv-gi; a-le nv-wa-da-le go-we-li u-ni-s-du-i-sv-gi, na-s-gi gv-ni-dv a-da-ne-hi tsi-gi; tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi-no do-ge-gu-go-da-ne-lv-gi na-s-gi-ya ni-gv-nv go-we-lv go-we-li-hi, na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-i.

272013.english: And the sea gave up the dead which were in it; and death and hell delivered up the dead which were in them: and they were judged every man according to their works.
272013.cherokee: ᎠᎺᏉᎯᏃ ᏚᏲᏒᎩ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎾᎿᎭᏄᎾᏛᏅᎢ; ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗᏃ ᎠᎴ ᏨᏍᎩᏃ ᏚᏂᏲᏒ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏁᎲᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᏕᎨᎫᎪᏓᏁᎸᎩ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᎠᏂᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ.
272013.phonetic: A-me-quo-hi-no du-yo-sv-gi tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi na-hna nu-na-dv-nv-i; a-yo-hu-hi-s-di-no a-le tsv-s-gi-no du-ni-yo-sv tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi na-hna a-ne-hv-i; a-le de-ge-gu-go-da-ne-lv-gi ni-ga-di-yu a-ni-si-yv-wi-ha na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-i.

272014.english: And death and hell were cast into the lake of fire. This is the second death.
272014.cherokee: ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏨᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏥᎸ ᏨᏓᎸ ᏫᏕᎨᎦᏓᎢᏅᏒᎩ.  ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
272014.phonetic: A-yo-hu-hi-s-di-no ge-sv a-le tsv-s-gi-no a-tsi-lv tsv-da-lv wi-de-ge-ga-da-i-nv-sv-gi.  Hi-a na-s-gi ta-li-ne a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv-i.

272015.english: And whosoever was not found written in the book of life was cast into the lake of fire.
272015.cherokee: ᎾᏂᎥᏃ ᎩᎶ (ᏚᎾᏙᎥ) ᏂᏗᎪᏪᎸᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᏓᏁᎯ ᎪᏪᎵᎯ, ᏫᏕᎨᎦᏓᎢᎡᎬᎩ ᎠᏥᎸ ᏨᏓᎸᎢ.
272015.phonetic: Na-ni-v-no gi-lo (du-na-do-v) ni-di-go-we-lv-na ge-sv hi-a na-s-gi gv-ni-dv a-da-ne-hi go-we-li-hi, wi-de-ge-ga-da-i-e-gv-gi a-tsi-lv tsv-da-lv-i.

272101.english: And I saw a new heaven and a new earth: for the first heaven and the first earth were passed away; and there was no more sea.
272101.cherokee: ᏓᎩᎪᎲᎩᏃ ᎢᏤ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏤ ᎦᏙᎯ; ᎢᎬᏱᏱᏰᏃ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎦᏙᎯ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ ᎤᏂᎶᏐᏅᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᎺᏉᎯ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ.
272101.phonetic: Da-gi-go-hv-gi-no i-tse ga-lv-lo-i a-le i-tse ga-do-hi; i-gv-yi-yi-ye-no ga-lv-lo-i a-le i-gv-yi-yi ga-do-hi tsi-ge-sv-gi u-ni-lo-so-nv-gi; a-le v-tla hna-quo a-me-quo-hi yi-ge-se-i.

272102.english: And I John saw the holy city, new Jerusalem, coming down from God out of heaven, prepared as a bride adorned for her husband.
272102.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᏣᏂ ᎠᎩᎪᎲᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎦᏚᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏤ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᏓᏳᏠᎠᏒᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏱ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ, ᎤᏛᏅᎢᏍᏛᎩ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᏥᏰᎯ ᏣᏙᏚᎢᏍᏗᏍᎪ ᏣᏛᏅᎢᏍᏓᏁᎰ ᎤᏰᎯ.
272102.phonetic: A-le a-yv Tsa-ni a-gi-go-hv-gi ga-lv-quo-di-yu ga-du-hv na-s-gi i-tse Tsi-lu-si-li-mi da-yu-tlo-a-sv-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi-yi ga-lv-lo-i, u-dv-nv-i-s-dv-gi na-s-gi-ya a-tsi-ye-hi tsa-do-du-i-s-di-s-go tsa-dv-nv-i-s-da-ne-ho u-ye-hi.

272103.english: And I heard a great voice out of heaven saying, Behold, the tabernacle of God is with men, and he will dwell with them, and they shall be his people, and God himself shall be with them, and be their God.
272103.cherokee: ᎠᏆᏛᎦᏅᎩᏃ ᎠᏍᏓᏯ ᎧᏁᎬ ᎩᎶ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏛᏓᎴᎲᏍᎬᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬᎩ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎵᏦᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎤᏓᏑᏯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏁᎲ ᏛᏕᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏤᎵ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏴᏫ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏃ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎡᎮᏍᏗ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
272103.phonetic: A-qua-dv-ga-nv-gi-no a-s-da-ya ka-ne-gv gi-lo ga-lv-la-di dv-da-le-hv-s-gv-gi hi-a ni-ga-we-s-gv-gi, Gv-ni-yu-quo U-ne-la-nv-hi u-li-tso-dv yv-wi a-ne-hv u-da-su-ya, a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-gi a-ne-hv dv-de-ni, a-le na-s-gi tsu-tse-li ge-se-s-di yv-wi, U-ne-la-nv-hi-no u-wa-sv na-s-gi a-ne-hv e-he-s-di u-na-tse-li U-ne-la-nv-hi ge-se-s-di.

272104.english: And God shall wipe away all tears from their eyes; and there shall be no more death, neither sorrow, nor crying, neither shall there be any more pain: for the former things are passed away.
272104.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏙᏓᎦᏅᎦᎸᎯ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏓᏂᎦᏌᏬᎢᎲᎢ; ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏰᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲ ᎠᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏠᏯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏰᎮᏍᏗ ᎡᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎢᎬᏱᏱᏰᏃ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏤᎲ ᎤᎶᏐᏅ.
272104.phonetic: A-le U-ne-la-nv-hi do-da-ga-nv-ga-lv-hi ni-ga-dv da-ni-ga-sa-wo-i-hv-i; v-tla a-le hna-quo ye-he-s-di a-yo-hu-hi-s-di, a-le u-yo a-ye-lv-di ge-sv, a-le di-tlo-ya-s-di ge-sv-i, v-tla a-le hna-quo ye-he-s-di e-hi-s-di ge-sv-i; i-gv-yi-yi-ye-no tsu-da-le-nv-dv tse-hv u-lo-so-nv.

272105.english: And he that sat upon the throne said, Behold, I make all things new. And he said unto me, Write: for these words are true and faithful.
272105.cherokee: ᎦᏍᎩᎸᏃ ᎤᏬᎵ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎢᏤ ᏂᎬᏁᎭ.  ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᎾᎩᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᎰᏪᎸᎦ; ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎬᏜᏓᏏᏛᎡᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ.
272105.phonetic: Ga-s-gi-lv-no u-wo-li, hi-a nu-we-sv-gi, Gv-ni-yu-quo ni-ga-di-yu tsu-da-le-nv-dv i-tse ni-gv-ne-ha.  A-le hi-a na-gi-we-se-lv-gi, Ho-we-lv-ga; hi-a-ye-no na-s-gi ka-no-he-dv gv-dla-si-dv-e-di ni-ge-sv-na a-le u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya.

272106.english: And he said unto me, It is done. I am Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the end. I will give unto him that is athirst of the fountain of the water of life freely.
272106.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᎾᎩᏪᏎᎸᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏌᎵᏍᏓ.  ᎠᏴ ᎡᎵᏆ ᎠᎴ ᎣᎻᎦ, ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.  ᎤᏔᏕᎩᏍᎩ ᎠᎹ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᏓᏁᎯ ᎦᏄᎪᎬ ᏓᏥᏁᏁᎵ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
272106.phonetic: A-le hi-a na-gi-we-se-lv-gi; Na-s-gi ni-sa-li-s-da.  A-yv E-li-qua a-le O-mi-ga, i-gv-yi-yi ge-sv a-le u-li-s-qua-lv-di ge-sv-i.  U-ta-de-gi-s-gi a-ma gv-ni-dv a-da-ne-hi ga-nu-go-gv da-tsi-ne-ne-li tsu-gv-wa-lo-di ni-ge-sv-na.

272107.english: He that overcometh shall inherit all things; and I will be his God, and he shall be my son.
272107.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᎠᏓᏎᎪᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᏥᏯᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎤᏩᏒᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎠᏇᏥ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
272107.phonetic: Gi-lo a-da-se-go-gi-s-ge-s-di ni-ga-di-yu tsu-da-le-nv-dv u-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di ge-se-s-di; a-le a-yv Tsi-ya-ne-la-nv-hi ge-se-s-di, u-wa-sv-no a-yv a-que-tsi ge-se-s-di.

272108.english: But the fearful, and unbelieving, and the abominable, and murderers, and whoremongers, and sorcerers, and idolaters, and all liars, shall have their part in the lake which burneth with fire and brimstone: which is the second death.
272108.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏍᎦᎡᎾᏍᎩᏂ. ᎠᎴ ᏄᏃᎯᏳᏒᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᎢᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎾᏓᎯᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏁᎫᏥᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎾᏙᏂᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᏰᎸᎯ ᏗᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᎠᏂᏰᎪᎩ, ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᎢᎨᎬᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎥᏓᎸ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏓᏪᎵᎩᏍᎬ ᎠᏥᎸ ᎠᎴ ᏌᎪᏂᎨ ᎠᏓᏪᎵᎩᏍᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᏥᎩ.
272108.phonetic: U-ni-s-ga-e-na-s-gi-ni. a-le nu-no-hi-yu-sv-na, a-le u-ni-s-ga-i-s-di, a-le di-na-da-hi-hi, a-le u-ni-ne-gu-tsi-dv, a-le di-na-do-ni-s-gi, a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi di-ye-lv-hi di-na-da-do-li-s-da-ne-hi, a-le ni-ga-di-yu a-ni-ye-go-gi, u-na-tse-li i-ge-gv-ne-di ge-se-s-di v-da-lv na-hna a-da-we-li-gi-s-gv a-tsi-lv a-le sa-go-ni-ge a-da-we-li-gi-s-gi; na-s-gi ta-li-ne a-yo-hu-hi-s-di tsi-gi.

272109.english: And there came unto me one of the seven angels which had the seven vials full of the seven last plagues, and talked with me, saying, Come hither, I will shew thee the bride, the Lamb's wife.
272109.cherokee: ᎠᎩᎷᏤᎸᎩᏃ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎦᎵᏉᎩ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏓᏂᏰᎲᎩ ᏚᎵᏉᎩ ᎫᎫ ᎦᎵᏉᎩ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗ ᎤᏕᏯᏙᏗ ᏗᏟᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏆᎵᏃᎮᏔᏅᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏒᎩ; ᎡᎮᎾ, ᏓᎬᏯᏎᎮᎵᏃ ᎠᏥᏰᎯ ᎤᏃᏕᎾ ᎠᎩᎾ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ.
272109.phonetic: A-gi-lu-tse-lv-gi-no a-si-yv-wi na-s-gi na ga-li-quo-gi i-ya-ni-dv di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi, na-s-gi tsi-da-ni-ye-hv-gi du-li-quo-gi gu-gu ga-li-quo-gi u-li-s-qua-lv-di u-de-ya-do-di di-tli-s-di, a-le a-qua-li-no-he-ta-nv-gi, hi-a nu-we-sv-gi; E-he-na, da-gv-ya-se-he-li-no a-tsi-ye-hi u-no-de-na a-gi-na u-da-li-i.

272110.english: And he carried me away in the spirit to a great and high mountain, and shewed me that great city, the holy Jerusalem, descending out of heaven from God,
272110.cherokee: ᎠᏆᏘᎾᏫᏛᎲᎩᏃ ᏗᏆᏓᏅᏛ ᎡᏆ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏅ ᎢᎦᏘ ᏦᏓᎸᎢ ᏩᏆᏘᏅᏍᏔᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎸᎩ Ꮎ ᎡᏆ ᎦᏚᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ, ᎡᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᏍᏗᏗᏒᎩ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏱ ᏛᏓᎴᎲᏍᎬᎩ.
272110.phonetic: A-qua-ti-na-wi-dv-hv-gi-no di-qua-da-nv-dv e-qua a-le i-nv i-ga-ti tso-da-lv-i wa-qua-ti-nv-s-ta-nv-gi, a-le a-gi-na-nu-go-wi-se-lv-gi na e-qua ga-du-hv-i, na-s-gi ga-lv-quo-di Tsi-lu-si-li-mi, e-la-di nv-da-yu-s-di-di-sv-gi ga-lv-la-di U-ne-la-nv-hi-yi dv-da-le-hv-s-gv-gi.

272111.english: Having the glory of God: and her light was like unto a stone most precious, even like a jasper stone, clear as crystal;
272111.cherokee: ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎤᏣᏃᏛᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᎸᏌᏛ, ᏅᏯ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏣᏍᏆ ᏅᏯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ ᏗᎬᏩᎸᏌᏛ ᎨᏒᎩ.
272111.phonetic: Ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga u-tsa-no-dv-gi; a-le na-s-gi du-lv-sa-dv, nv-ya u-tsa-ti tsu-gv-wa-lo-di na-s-gi-ya ge-sv-gi, na-s-gi tsa-s-qua nv-ya na-s-gi-ya-i di-gv-wa-lv-sa-dv ge-sv-gi.

272112.english: And had a wall great and high, and had twelve gates, and at the gates twelve angels, and names written thereon, which are the names of the twelve tribes of the children of Israel:
272112.cherokee: ᎠᏐᏴᎩᏃ ᎡᏆ ᎢᏅ ᎢᎦᏘ, ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱᏃ ᏔᎳᏚ ᏕᎪᏢᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ [ᏓᏂᏙᎬᎩ,] ᏚᎾᏙᎥᏃ ᏕᎪᏪᎸᎩ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎾᏂᎳᏍᏓᎸ ᎢᏏᎵ ᏧᏪᏥ ᏚᎾᏙᎥᎢ.
272112.phonetic: A-so-yv-gi-no e-qua i-nv i-ga-ti, ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi-no ta-la-du de-go-tlv-sv-gi, a-le ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi ta-la-du i-ya-ni-dv di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi [da-ni-do-gv-gi,] du-na-do-v-no de-go-we-lv-gi ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi, na-s-gi ta-la-du na-ni-la-s-da-lv I-si-li tsu-we-tsi du-na-do-v-i.

272113.english: On the east three gates; on the north three gates; on the south three gates; and on the west three gates.
272113.cherokee: ᏅᏙ ᏗᎧᎸᎬ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏦᎢ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ [ᏕᎪᏢᏒᎩ,] ᏧᏴᏢᏃ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏦᎢ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ; ᏧᎦᎾᏮᏃ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏦᎢ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ; ᏭᏕᎵᎬᏃ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏦᎢ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ.
272113.phonetic: Nv-do di-ka-lv-gv i-di-tlv tso-i ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi [de-go-tlv-sv-gi,] tsu-yv-tlv-no i-di-tlv tso-i ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi; tsu-ga-na-wv-no i-di-tlv tso-i ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi; wu-de-li-gv-no i-di-tlv tso-i ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi.

272114.english: And the wall of the city had twelve foundations, and in them the names of the twelve apostles of the Lamb.
272114.cherokee: ᎠᏐᏴᏃ ᎦᏚᎲ ᏔᎳᏚ ᏕᎦᎫᏍᏓᎥᎩ, ᏕᎦᎫᏍᏓᎥᏃ ᏔᎳᏚ ᏚᎾᏙᎥᎢ [ᏕᎪᏪᎸᎩ,] ᎾᏍᎩ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎤᏃᏕᎾ ᎠᎩᎾ ᏧᏅᏏᏛ ᏚᎾᏙᎥᎢ.
272114.phonetic: A-so-yv-no ga-du-hv ta-la-du de-ga-gu-s-da-v-gi, de-ga-gu-s-da-v-no ta-la-du du-na-do-v-i [de-go-we-lv-gi,] na-s-gi ta-la-du i-ya-ni-dv U-no-de-na a-gi-na tsu-nv-si-dv du-na-do-v-i.

272115.english: And he that talked with me had a golden reed to measure the city, and the gates thereof, and the wall thereof.
272115.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏆᎵᏃᎮᏔᏅᎯ ᎦᏁᎲᎩ ᎠᏕᎸᏓᎶᏂᎨ ᎠᏢᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏟᎶᏍᏗ, ᎦᏚᎲ ᎠᏟᎶᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏗᏟᎶᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏐᏴ ᎠᏟᎶᏍᏗ.
272115.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no a-qua-li-no-he-ta-nv-hi ga-ne-hv-gi a-de-lv-da-lo-ni-ge a-tlv-ta-nv-hi a-tli-lo-s-di, ga-du-hv a-tli-lo-s-di, a-le ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi di-tli-lo-s-di, a-le a-so-yv a-tli-lo-s-di.

272116.english: And the city lieth foursquare, and the length is as large as the breadth: and he measured the city with the reed, twelve thousand furlongs. The length and the breadth and the height of it are equal.
272116.cherokee: ᎦᏚᎲᏃ ᏅᎩ ᏧᏅᏏᏴ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎦᏅᎯᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏯᏛᎥ ᎤᏠᏱᏉ ᎨᏒᎩ.  ᎤᏟᎶᎥᎩᏃ ᎦᏚᎲ ᎤᏩᏔᏅᎩ ᎠᏟᎶᏍᏗ, ᎯᏍᎩᎦᏚ ᎢᏯᏍᎪᎯᏧᏈ ᎢᏳᏟᎶᏛ ᏂᎬᎩ.  ᏂᎦᏅᎯᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏯᏛᎲ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛᎢ ᎤᏠᏱᏉ ᎨᏒᎩ.
272116.phonetic: Ga-du-hv-no nv-gi tsu-nv-si-yv ge-sv-gi, ga-nv-hi-sv a-le a-ya-dv-v u-tlo-yi-quo ge-sv-gi.  U-tli-lo-v-gi-no ga-du-hv u-wa-ta-nv-gi a-tli-lo-s-di, hi-s-gi-ga-du i-ya-s-go-hi-tsu-qui i-yu-tli-lo-dv ni-gv-gi.  Ni-ga-nv-hi-sv a-le na-ya-dv-hv a-le ni-ga-dv-i u-tlo-yi-quo ge-sv-gi.

272117.english: And he measured the wall thereof, an hundred and forty and four cubits, according to the measure of a man, that is, of the angel.
272117.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏴᏃ ᎤᏟᎶᎥᎩ ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏧᏈ ᏅᎦᏍᎪᎯ ᏅᎩᎦᎵ ᎢᏯᎩᏳᏍᏈᏛ ᎤᏟᎶᎥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏟᎶᏍᏗ ᎢᎦᏅᎯᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎤᏟᎶᏍᏗ.
272117.phonetic: A-se-yv-no u-tli-lo-v-gi a-s-go-hi-tsu-qui nv-ga-s-go-hi nv-gi-ga-li i-ya-gi-yu-s-qui-dv u-tli-lo-v-gi, na-s-gi yv-wi u-tli-lo-s-di i-ga-nv-hi-dv, na-s-gi di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi u-tli-lo-s-di.

272118.english: And the building of the wall of it was of jasper: and the city was pure gold, like unto clear glass.
272118.cherokee: ᎠᏐᏴᏃ ᏣᏍᏆ ᏅᏯ ᎠᏁᏍᎨᏛᎩ; ᎦᏚᎲᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎾᏑᏴᎾ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏓᎶᏂᎨ ᎪᏢᏛᎩ, ᏧᎸᏌᏛ ᎠᏓᎨᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ.
272118.phonetic: A-so-yv-no tsa-s-qua nv-ya a-ne-s-ge-dv-gi; ga-du-hv-no go-hu-s-di na-su-yv-na a-de-lv da-lo-ni-ge go-tlv-dv-gi, tsu-lv-sa-dv a-da-ge-di na-s-gi-ya-i.

272119.english: And the foundations of the wall of the city were garnished with all manner of precious stones. The first foundation was jasper; the second, sapphire; the third, a chalcedony; the fourth, an emerald;
272119.cherokee: ᏕᎦᎫᏍᏓᎥᏃ ᎠᏐᏴ ᎦᏚᎲᎢ ᏕᎪᏚᎢᏍᏛᎩ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᏗᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᏅᏯ; ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎦᎫᏍᏓᎥ ᏣᏍᏆ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᏔᎵᏁᏃ ᏌᏆᏯ, ᏦᎢᏁᏃ ᎦᎵᏏᏙᏂ, ᏅᎩᏁᏃ ᎡᎻᎳ,
272119.phonetic: De-ga-gu-s-da-v-no a-so-yv ga-du-hv-i de-go-du-i-s-dv-gi nu-da-le-sv di-ga-lv-quo-di nv-ya; i-gv-yi-yi ga-gu-s-da-v tsa-s-qua ge-sv-gi, ta-li-ne-no sa-qua-ya, tso-i-ne-no ga-li-si-do-ni, nv-gi-ne-no e-mi-la,

272120.english: The fifth, sardonyx; the sixth, sardius; the seventh, chrysolite; the eighth, beryl; the ninth, a topaz; the tenth, a chrysoprasus; the eleventh, a jacinth; the twelfth, an amethyst.
272120.cherokee: ᎯᏍᎩᏃ ᏌᏙᏂᎩ, ᏑᏓᎵᏁᏃ ᏌᏗᏱ, ᎦᎵᏉᎩᏁᏃ ᎩᏐᎳᏗ, ᏧᏁᎵᏁᏃ ᏇᎵ, ᏐᎣᏁᎵᏁᏃ ᏙᏆᏏ, ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏁᏃ ᏟᏌᏇᏌ, ᏌᏚᏏᏁᏃ ᏤᏏᏂ, ᏔᎳᏚᏏᏁᏃ ᎠᎻᏗᏏ.
272120.phonetic: Hi-s-gi-no sa-do-ni-gi, su-da-li-ne-no sa-di-yi, ga-li-quo-gi-ne-no gi-so-la-di, tsu-ne-li-ne-no que-li, so-o-ne-li-ne-no do-qua-si, a-s-go-hi-ne-no tli-sa-que-sa, sa-du-si-ne-no tse-si-ni, ta-la-du-si-ne-no a-mi-di-si.

272121.english: And the twelve gates were twelve pearls; every several gate was of one pearl: and the street of the city was pure gold, as it were transparent glass.
272121.cherokee: ᏔᎳᏚᏃ ᏕᎪᏢᏒ ᏗᏍᏚᏗ ᏔᎳᏚ ᏓᎬᎾᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ ᏕᎪᏢᏛᎩ; ᏌᏉ ᎠᏍᏚᏗ ᏌᏉ ᏓᎬᎾᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎪᏢᏛᎩ ᎡᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏜᏓᏅᏛ ᎦᏚᎲ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎾᏑᏴᎾ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏓᎶᏂᎨ ᎠᏢᏛᎩ, ᏧᎸᏌᏛ ᎠᏓᎨᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ.
272121.phonetic: Ta-la-du-no de-go-tlv-sv di-s-du-di ta-la-du da-gv-na-i-yu-na-s-di de-go-tlv-dv-gi; sa-quo a-s-du-di sa-quo da-gv-na-i-yu-s-di go-tlv-dv-gi e-da-s-di-yi u-dla-nv-dv ga-du-hv go-hu-s-di na-su-yv-na a-de-lv da-lo-ni-ge a-tlv-dv-gi, tsu-lv-sa-dv a-da-ge-di na-s-gi-ya-i.

272122.english: And I saw no temple therein: for the Lord God Almighty and the Lamb are the temple of it.
272122.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏯᎩᎪᎮ ᎾᎿᎭᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ; ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏃᏕᎾ-ᎠᎩᎾ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᎩ.
272122.phonetic: V-tla a-le ya-gi-go-he na-hna di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi; u-gv-wi-yu-hi-ye-no U-ne-la-nv-hi Wi-na-s-dv-na u-li-ni-gi-dv a-le U-no-de-na--a-gi-na na-s-gi di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi i-gi.

272123.english: And the city had no need of the sun, neither of the moon, to shine in it: for the glory of God did lighten it, and the Lamb is the light thereof.
272123.cherokee: ᎦᏚᎲᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏳᎾᏚᎵ ᏅᏙ-ᎢᎦ-ᎡᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏅᏙ-ᎡᏃᏱ-ᎡᎯ ᎤᎦᎵᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᎿᎭᏂ; ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎢᎦ ᎤᏘᏍᏛ ᎾᎿᎭᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏃᏕᎾ-ᎠᎩᎾ ᎢᎦ ᎠᏘᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎢᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᏂ.
272123.phonetic: Ga-du-hv-no v-tla yu-na-du-li nv-do--i-ga--e-hi a-le nv-do--e-no-yi--e-hi u-ga-li-hi-s-di-yi na-hna-ni; ga-lv-quo-di-yu-ye-no ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li i-ga u-ti-s-dv na-hna-ni, a-le U-no-de-na--a-gi-na i-ga a-ti-s-di-s-gi i-gi na-hna-ni.

272124.english: And the nations of them which are saved shall walk in the light of it: and the kings of the earth do bring their glory and honour into it.
272124.cherokee: ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛᏃ ᏴᏫ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏥᏍᏕᎸᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᎸᏌᏛ ᎠᏁᏙᎮᏍᏗ; ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᏃ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏂᏴᎯᎭ ᎨᏥᎸᏉᏛ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᏤᎵ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏗᎦᎸᏉᏗ.
272124.phonetic: Tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv-no yv-wi na-s-gi ge-tsi-s-de-lv-dv ge-sv na-s-gi du-lv-sa-dv a-ne-do-he-s-di; u-ni-gv-wi-yu-no e-lo-hi a-ne-hi na-hna a-ni-yv-hi-ha ge-tsi-lv-quo-dv a-le tsu-na-tse-li tsu-da-le-nv-dv di-ga-lv-quo-di.

272125.english: And the gates of it shall not be shut at all by day: for there shall be no night there.
272125.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᎿᎭᏕᎪᏢᏒ ᎥᏝ ᏧᏂᏍᏚᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᎦ, ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏒᏃᏱ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᎿᎭᏂ.
272125.phonetic: A-le ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi na-hna de-go-tlv-sv v-tla tsu-ni-s-du-di yi-ge-se-s-di i-ga, v-tla-ye-no sv-no-yi yi-ge-se-s-di na-hna-ni.

272126.english: And they shall bring the glory and honour of the nations into it.
272126.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏂᏲᎯᎮᏍᏗ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎠᏴ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏗᎦᎸᏉᏗ.
272126.phonetic: A-le na-hna a-ni-yo-hi-he-s-di tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv a-yv u-na-tse-li ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv a-le tsa-da-le-nv-dv di-ga-lv-quo-di.

272127.english: And there shall in no wise enter into it any thing that defileth, neither whatsoever worketh abomination, or maketh a lie: but they which are written in the Lamb's book of life.
272127.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏎ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏴᏍᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎦᏓᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏆᏘᏍᏗ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ; ᎤᏅᏒᏍᎩᏂ [ᎤᏂᏴᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏚᎾᏙᎥ] ᏗᎪᏪᎵ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᏓᏁᎯ ᎪᏪᎵᎯ ᎤᏃᏕᎾᎠᎩᎾ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ.
272127.phonetic: A-le v-tla a-se na-hna u-yv-s-di yi-ge-se-s-di go-hu-s-di ga-da-ha, a-le u-ni-qua-ti-s-di tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi, a-le ga-ye-go-gi; u-nv-sv-s-gi-ni [u-ni-yv-s-di ge-se-s-di du-na-do-v] di-go-we-li gv-ni-dv a-da-ne-hi go-we-li-hi U-no-de-na-a-gi-na u-tse-li-ga.

272201.english: And he shewed me a pure river of water of life, clear as crystal, proceeding out of the throne of God and of the Lamb.
272201.cherokee: ᎠᎩᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎸᎩᏃ ᎤᏁᎬ ᎤᏪᏴ ᎠᎹ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᏓᏁᎯ, ᏗᎬᏩᎸᏌᏛ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᏓᎦᎾᏄᎪᎬᎩ ᎦᏍᎩᎸ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏃᏕᎾ ᎠᎩᎾ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ.
272201.phonetic: A-gi-na-nu-go-wi-se-lv-gi-no u-ne-gv u-we-yv a-ma gv-ni-dv a-da-ne-hi, di-gv-wa-lv-sa-dv ge-sv-gi, da-ga-na-nu-go-gv-gi ga-s-gi-lv U-ne-la-nv-hi a-le U-no-de-na a-gi-na u-na-tse-li-ga.

272202.english: In the midst of the street of it, and on either side of the river, was there the tree of life, which bare twelve manner of fruits, and yielded her fruit every month: and the leaves of the tree were for the healing of the nations.
272202.cherokee: ᎠᏰᎵᏃ ᎤᏜᏓᏅᏛ ᎾᎿᎭᎡᏓᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏧᎳᏗᏢ ᎤᏪᏴᎢ, ᏡᎬᎩ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᏓᏁᎯ ᏡᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᎩ ᎠᏓᏛᏍᎬᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏂᏓᏦᎳᏂᏒ ᎬᎾᏍᎬᎩ ᎤᏓᏔᏅᎯ; ᎤᎳᏍᏚᏒᏃ ᎤᎾᏅᏬᏗ ᎨᏒᎩ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ.
272202.phonetic: A-ye-li-no u-dla-nv-dv na-hna e-da-s-di-yi, a-le i-tsu-la-di-tlv u-we-yv-i, tlu-gv-gi gv-ni-dv a-da-ne-hi tlu-gv-i, na-s-gi ta-la-du i-yu-da-le-gi a-da-dv-s-gv-gi a-le ni-da-tso-la-ni-sv gv-na-s-gv-gi u-da-ta-nv-hi; u-la-s-du-sv-no u-na-nv-wo-di ge-sv-gi tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi.

272203.english: And there shall be no more curse: but the throne of God and of the Lamb shall be in it; and his servants shall serve him:
272203.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏰᎮᏍᏗ ᎤᏐᏅᎢ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏃᏕᎾ ᎠᎩᎾ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎦᏍᎩᎶ ᎾᎿ ᎭᎦᏍᎩᎴᏍᏗ; ᏧᏤᎵᏃ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎬᏩᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ;
272203.phonetic: V-tla a-le hna-quo ye-he-s-di u-so-nv-i; U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni u-tse-li a-le U-no-de-na a-gi-na u-tse-li ga-s-gi-lo na-hna ga-s-gi-le-s-di; tsu-tse-li-no tsu-nv-si-da-s-di gv-wa-da-do-li-s-da-ne-he-s-di;

272204.english: And they shall see his face; and his name shall be in their foreheads.
272204.cherokee: ᎤᎧᏛᏃ ᎠᏂᎪᏩᏘᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᏚᏙᎥᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏂᎬᏓᎨᏂ ᏕᎪᏪᎴᏍᏗ.
272204.phonetic: U-ka-dv-no a-ni-go-wa-ti-s-ge-s-di; du-do-v-no na-s-gi di-ni-gv-da-ge-ni de-go-we-le-s-di.

272205.english: And there shall be no night there; and they need no candle, neither light of the sun; for the Lord God giveth them light: and they shall reign for ever and ever.
272205.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏒᏃᏱ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᎿᎭᏂ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏳᎾᏚᎵ ᎠᏨᏍᏙᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᏙ ᎢᎦᎡᎯ ᎢᎦ ᎤᏘᏍᏛᎢ; ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᎦ ᏓᏘᏍᏓᏁᎭ, ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯᏃ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
272205.phonetic: V-tla a-le sv-no-yi yi-ge-se-s-di na-hna-ni, v-tla a-le yu-na-du-li a-tsv-s-do-di, a-le nv-do i-ga-e-hi i-ga u-ti-s-dv-i; U-gv-wi-yu-hi-ye-no U-ne-la-nv-hi i-ga da-ti-s-da-ne-ha, u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi-no ge-se-s-di u-li-s-qua-di-s-di ni-ge-sv-na.

272206.english: And he said unto me, These sayings are faithful and true: and the Lord God of the holy prophets sent his angel to shew unto his servants the things which must shortly be done.
272206.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᎩᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎬᏜᏓᏏᏛᎡᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ.  ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎨᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ ᏧᏅᏎ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏧᏩᏁᏗᏱ ᏧᏤᎵ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎾᏉ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
272206.phonetic: Hi-a-no na-gi-we-se-lv-gi, Hi-a na-s-gi ka-no-he-dv gv-dla-si-dv-e-di ni-ge-sv-na a-le u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya.  U-gv-wi-yu-hi-no U-ne-la-nv-hi ge-tsi-lv-quo-di a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi u-na-tse-li-ga tsu-nv-se u-tse-li di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi gv-ni-ge-sv i-tsu-wa-ne-di-yi tsu-tse-li tsu-nv-si-da-s-di, na-s-gi tsu-da-le-nv-dv ni-go-hi-lv-na-quo i-yu-li-s-do-di ge-sv-i.

272207.english: Behold, I come quickly: blessed is he that keepeth the sayings of the prophecy of this book.
272207.cherokee: ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᏞᎩᏳ ᏓᏥᎷᏥ; ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎠᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏒᎯ ᎠᏂ ᎪᏪᎵᎯ ᎪᏪᎸᎢ.
272207.phonetic: Gv-ni-yu-quo tle-gi-yu da-tsi-lu-tsi; o-si-yu i-yu-li-s-da-ne-di a-s-qua-ni-go-di-s-gi ka-no-he-dv a-do-le-ho-sv-hi a-ni go-we-li-hi go-we-lv-i.

272208.english: And I John saw these things, and heard them. And when I had heard and seen, I fell down to worship before the feet of the angel which shewed me these things.
272208.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᏣᏂ ᎠᎩᎪᎲᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏆᏛᎦᏅᎩ.  ᎠᏆᏛᎦᏅᏃ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᎪᎲ, ᎡᎳᏗ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏅᎩ ᏓᎦᏓᏙᎵᏍᏔᏂᏒᎩ ᏚᎳᏍᎬ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎠᎩᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎸᎯ.
272208.phonetic: A-le a-yv Tsa-ni a-gi-go-hv-gi hi-a na-s-gi tsu-da-le-nv-dv, a-le a-qua-dv-ga-nv-gi.  A-qua-dv-ga-nv-no a-le a-gi-go-hv, e-la-di a-qua-da-nv-nv-gi da-ga-da-do-li-s-ta-ni-sv-gi du-la-s-gv na-s-gi na di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi hi-a na-s-gi tsu-da-le-nv-dv a-gi-na-nu-go-wi-se-lv-hi.

272209.english: Then saith he unto me, See thou do it not: for I am thy fellowservant, and of thy brethren the prophets, and of them which keep the sayings of this book: worship God.
272209.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᎩᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᎥᏞᏍᏗ.  ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᎤᏠᏱᏉ ᎡᎩᏂᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᏥᎨᏒ ᎢᏣᎵᏅᏟ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎠᏂ ᎪᏪᎵᎯ ᎪᏪᎸᎢ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎯᏯᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏏ.
272209.phonetic: Hi-a-no na-gi-we-se-lv-gi, V-tle-s-di.  A-yv-ye-no u-tlo-yi-quo e-gi-ni-nv-si-da-s-di, a-le a-yv na-s-gi a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi tsi-ge-sv i-tsa-li-nv-tli, a-le na-s-gi a-ni-s-qua-ni-go-di-s-gi ka-no-he-dv a-ni go-we-li-hi go-we-lv-i; u-ne-la-nv-hi hi-ya-da-do-li-s-da-si.

272210.english: And he saith unto me, Seal not the sayings of the prophecy of this book: for the time is at hand.
272210.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᎩᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏣᏍᏚᏅᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏒᎯ ᎠᏂ ᎯᎠ ᎪᏪᎵᎯ; ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎯᏗᏰᏃ.
272210.phonetic: Hi-a-no na-gi-we-se-lv-gi, Tle-s-di tsa-s-du-nv-gi ka-no-he-dv a-do-le-ho-sv-hi a-ni hi-a go-we-li-hi; u-s-qua-lv-hi-di-ye-no.

272211.english: He that is unjust, let him be unjust still: and he which is filthy, let him be filthy still: and he that is righteous, let him be righteous still: and he that is holy, let him be holy still.
272211.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᎠᏍᎦᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᏏᏉ ᎠᏍᎦᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎩᎶᏃ ᎦᏓᎭ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᏏᏉ ᎦᏓᎭ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎩᎶᏃ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᏏᏉ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎩᎶᏃ ᎠᏍᎦᎾ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᏏᏉ ᎠᏍᎦᎾ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
272211.phonetic: Gi-lo a-s-ga-na ge-se-s-di, a-si-quo a-s-ga-na ge-se-s-di; gi-lo-no ga-da-ha ge-se-s-di, a-si-quo ga-da-ha ge-se-s-di; gi-lo-no o-si-yu i-ya-dv-ne-hi ge-se-s-di, a-si-quo o-si-yu i-ya-dv-ne-hi ge-se-s-di; gi-lo-no a-s-ga-na ni-ge-sv-na ge-se-s-di, a-si-quo a-s-ga-na ni-ge-sv-na ge-se-s-di.

272212.english: And, behold, I come quickly; and my reward is with me, to give every man according as his work shall be.
272212.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᏞᎩᏳ ᏓᏥᎷᏥ; ᎠᎴ ᎠᏆᎫᏴᏗ ᏥᏰᎮᏍᏗ, ᎦᏥᏁᏗᏱ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎠᏂᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ.
272212.phonetic: A-le gv-ni-yu-quo tle-gi-yu da-tsi-lu-tsi; a-le a-qua-gu-yv-di tsi-ye-he-s-di, ga-tsi-ne-di-yi na-ni-v a-ni-si-yv-wi-ha na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-i.

272213.english: I am Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the end, the first and the last.
272213.cherokee: ᎠᏴ ᎡᎵᏆ ᎠᎴ ᎣᎻᎦ, ᏗᏓᎴᏅᏗᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᎢ.
272213.phonetic: A-yv E-li-qua a-le O-mi-ga, di-da-le-nv-di-s-gi a-le a-s-qua-di-s-di-s-gi, a-le i-gv-yi-yi a-le u-li-s-qua-lv-i.

272214.english: Blessed are they that do his commandments, that they may have right to the tree of life, and may enter in through the gates into the city.
272214.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏤᎵ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᎢᏯᎾᏛᏁᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᏛ ᏡᎬ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏫᎬᏩᏂᏴᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎪᏢᏒ ᎦᏚᎲᎢ.
272214.phonetic: O-si-yu i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di na-s-gi na u-tse-li di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-ga-we-s-gv i-ya-na-dv-ne-hi, na-s-gi gv-ni-dv tlu-gv u-na-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, a-le wi-gv-wa-ni-yv-s-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi go-tlv-sv ga-du-hv-i.

272215.english: For without are dogs, and sorcerers, and whoremongers, and murderers, and idolaters, and whosoever loveth and maketh a lie.
272215.cherokee: ᏙᏱᏗᏢᏰᏃ ᎠᏁᏙᎭ ᎩᎶ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎾᏙᏂᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏁᎫᏥᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎾᏓᎯᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᏰᎸᎯ ᏗᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᎯ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᎨᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᎠᏃᏢᏍᎩ.
272215.phonetic: Do-yi-di-tlv-ye-no a-ne-do-ha gi-lo, a-le di-na-do-ni-s-gi, a-le u-ni-ne-gu-tsi-dv, a-le di-na-da-hi-hi, a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi di-ye-lv-hi di-na-da-do-li-s-da-ne-hi, a-le ni-ga-di-yu o-si-yu u-ni-ye-lv-hi ga-ye-go-gi ge-sv, a-le ga-ye-go-gi a-no-tlv-s-gi.

272216.english: I Jesus have sent mine angel to testify unto you these things in the churches. I am the root and the offspring of David, and the bright and morning star.
272216.cherokee: ᎠᏴ ᏥᏌ ᏗᏥᏅᏒ ᎠᏆᏤᎵ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏨᏁᏗᏱ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᏚᎾᏓᏡᏩᏗᏒᎢ.  ᎠᏴ ᏕᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᏢᏔᏅᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏃᏈᏏ ᏧᎦᏙᏴᎢᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏑᎾᎴ ᎡᎯ.
272216.phonetic: A-yv Tsi-sa di-tsi-nv-sv a-qua-tse-li di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi gv-ni-ge-sv i-tsv-ne-di-yi hi-a na-s-gi tsu-da-le-nv-dv tsu-na-ne-lo-di du-na-da-tlu-wa-di-sv-i.  A-yv De-wi u-we-tsi a-le na-s-gi u-ne-tlv-ta-nv-dv ge-sv-i, a-le no-qui-si tsu-ga-do-yv-i-s-di a-le su-na-le e-hi.

272217.english: And the Spirit and the bride say, Come. And let him that heareth say, Come. And let him that is athirst come. And whosoever will, let him take the water of life freely.
272217.cherokee: ᎠᏓᏅᏙᏃ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏥᏰᎯ ᎡᎮᎾ ᎠᎾᏗᎭ.  ᎠᎴ ᎠᏛᎩᏍᎩ ᎡᎮᎾ ᎠᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.  ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏔᏕᎩᏍᎩ ᏫᎦᎷᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎦᏁᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎹ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᏓᏁᎯ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
272217.phonetic: A-da-nv-do-no a-le a-tsi-ye-hi E-he-na a-na-di-ha.  A-le a-dv-gi-s-gi E-he-na a-di-s-ge-s-di.  A-le gi-lo u-ta-de-gi-s-gi wi-ga-lu-gi; a-le gi-lo u-du-li-s-ge-s-di ga-ne-gi-s-ge-s-di a-ma gv-ni-dv a-da-ne-hi tsu-gv-wa-lo-di ni-ge-sv-na.

272218.english: For I testify unto every man that heareth the words of the prophecy of this book, If any man shall add unto these things, God shall add unto him the plagues that are written in this book:
272218.cherokee: ᎬᏂᎨᏒᏰᏃ ᏂᎦᏥᏴᏁᎭ ᎾᏂᎥᏉ ᎩᎶ ᎠᎾᏛᎩᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏒᎯ ᎠᏂ ᎪᏪᎵᎯ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ  ᎢᎧᏁᏉᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎠᏂ ᎪᏪᎵᎯ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏎ ᎤᏁᏉᎡᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏕᏯᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏂ ᎪᏪᎵᎯ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ;
272218.phonetic: Gv-ni-ge-sv-ye-no ni-ga-tsi-yv-ne-ha na-ni-v-quo gi-lo a-na-dv-gi-s-gi ka-no-he-dv a-do-le-ho-sv-hi a-ni go-we-li-hi tsi-go-we-la, na-s-gi i-yu-no gi-lo  i-ka-ne-quo-s-ge-s-di hi-a na-s-gi tsu-da-le-nv-dv a-ni go-we-li-hi tsi-go-we-la, U-ne-la-nv-hi a-se u-ne-quo-e-di ge-se-s-di u-de-ya-do-di ge-sv a-ni go-we-li-hi tsi-go-we-la;

272219.english: And if any man shall take away from the words of the book of this prophecy, God shall take away his part out of the book of life, and out of the holy city, and from the things which are written in this book.
272219.cherokee: ᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎢᎪᏣᎴᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎢᎦᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎪᏪᎵᎯ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏒᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏎ ᏓᏳᏬᏣᎳᎡᎵ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᏓᏁᎯ ᎪᏪᎵᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎦᏚᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎪᏪᎸ ᎠᏂ ᎪᏪᎵᎯ.
272219.phonetic: I-yu a-le gi-lo i-go-tsa-le-s-ge-s-di i-ga-dv ka-no-he-dv go-we-li-hi hi-a na-s-gi a-do-le-ho-sv-hi ge-sv-i, U-ne-la-nv-hi a-se da-yu-wo-tsa-la-e-li u-tse-li ge-sv gv-ni-dv a-da-ne-hi go-we-li-hi, a-le ga-lv-quo-di-yu ga-du-hv-i, a-le tsu-da-le-nv-dv go-we-lv a-ni go-we-li-hi.

272220.english: He which testifieth these things saith, Surely I come quickly. Amen. Even so, come, Lord Jesus.
272220.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏁᎯ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᏞᎩᏳ ᏓᏥᎷᏥ.  ᎡᎺᏅ; ᎰᏩᏉ; ᏞᎩᏳ ᎯᎷᎩ ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ.
272220.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi tsu-da-le-nv-dv gv-ni-ge-sv i-gv-ne-hi, hi-a ni-ga-we-ha, u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya tle-gi-yu da-tsi-lu-tsi.  E-me-nv; ho-wa-quo; tle-gi-yu hi-lu-gi Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa.

272221.english: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all. Amen.
272221.cherokee: ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᎦᏤᎵᎦ ᎢᏤᎳᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ ᏂᏥᎥᎢ.  ᎡᎺᏅ.
272221.phonetic: Gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv i-ga-tse-li-ga i-tse-la-di-do-he-s-di ni-tsi-v-i.  E-me-nv.
